Vi letar efter någon som vill påverka och ser till våra miljontals användares behov.
   

  

 Som Teammedlem Kommer Du Få Samarbeta Med Hela Produktteamet För Att Implementera Lösningar Och Säkerställa Bästa Möjliga Produktupplevelse. Detta Kommer Du Göra Genom Att
   

  

* Skriva ren, underhållbar och effektiv kod, men framförallt gillar du att lösa problem och utforska möjliga vägar framåt.
* Hålla dig uppdaterad med de senaste industritrenderna, teknikerna och bästa praxis.
* Vara delaktig i att förbättra utvecklingsprocesser och påverka val av verktyg.
* Genomföra grundliga tester för att identifiera och åtgärda buggar och prestandaproblem.
* Utveckla ny funktionalitet likväl som att jobba med hela produktlivscykeln.


 ,
   

  

* Som person är du engagerad, ansvarsfull och prestigelös och vill vara involverad och påverka produkten i det stora.
* Du har examen i datavetenskap, programvaruteknik eller ett närliggande område.
* Du har omkring 5 års erfarenhet av att utveckla Android-applikationer. Du kan Kotlin från grunden och har åtminstone experimenterat med Kotlin Multiplatform.
* Har erfarenhet av moderna Android-ramverk, såsom Jetpack, MVVM och Android Architecture Components.
* Du har gedigen förståelse för Android SDK, designmönster och bästa praxis.
* Bekantskap med RESTful API:er och integrationer mot webbtjänster.
* Har erfarenhet av automatiserade testsystem.
* Förståelse för agila utvecklingsmetoder och utmärkt kommunikations- och samarbetsförmåga.
* Svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.


**Vi erbjuder dig**
* Flexibel hybrid arbetsplats med ett öppet arbetsklimat.
* Goda utvecklings- och karriärmöjligheter,till exempel sponsrar vi dig att AWS-certifiera dig.
* Goda försäkrings- och tjänstepensionsvillkor.
* Friskvårdsbidrag och tillgång till kontoret Arkens gym och pool.
* Personalförmåner genom PostNords egen personalstiftelse PostNord Plus.
* Anställning sker enligt kollektivavtal.


**Vi gör vardagen enklare**
 PostNord är den ledande leverantören av kommunikations- och logistiklösningar till, från och inom Norden. Vi säkerställer postservicen till privatpersoner och företag i Sverige och Danmark. Vi strävar efter att göra vardagen enklare och mer hållbar för alla som bor och arbetar i Norden. Vi är ansvarstagande, modiga och engagerade, och leder effektivt förändring oavsett om vi leder oss själva eller andra. Vi uppmuntrar lagarbete, uppriktighet och positiva relationer på arbetsplatsen. Vi bygger vidare på våra framgångar och lär oss av både kollegor och misstag. Människor med olika bakgrund arbetar hos oss. Du kommer därför vara en del av en arbetsplats med stor mångfald, vilket bidrar till bättre resultat för verksamheten. Besök oss på www.postnord.com.
   

  

**Ansök**
 Vad väntar du på? Välkommen med din ansökan. Urval sker löpande så ansök så snart som möjligt. Om du undrar något över tjänsten, maila gustav.forsberg@postnord.com. Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!

title: Cloud Integration Architect
description:
*Vill du vara med och forma nästa generations integrationsplattform i en organisation med höga ambitioner inom digitalisering och datadrivna arbetssätt?*
*Hos oss får du en nyckelroll i arbetet med att utveckla och modernisera integrationslösningar i en hybrid- och molnbaserad miljö där vi successivt flyttar allt mer av vår integrationskapacitet till Azure. Vi söker dig som vill bidra till att utveckla robusta, skalbara och framtidssäkra integrationslösningar i en komplex systemmiljö där informationsutbyte är en central del av verksamheten.*
**Om jobbet**
 Som integrationsarkitekt hos oss får du en central roll i att utveckla och etablera arkitekturprinciper, tekniska riktlinjer och plattformar för integration i vår hybrid- och molnbaserade miljö.
   

  

 Du blir en del av teamet Integration Platform Services, där vi ansvarar för LF’s centrala integrationsplattform och möjliggör säker och effektiv informationsförsörjning mellan system – både on-prem och i molnet.
   

  

 Rollen innebär en kombination av strategiskt och hands-on arkitekturarbete. Du arbetar nära andra arkitekter, utvecklingsteam och verksamheten för att designa och utveckla integrationslösningar baserade på moderna integrationsmönster och molnteknologier.
   

  

 I rollen kommer du bland annat att:
   

  

* bidra till utvecklingen av vår integrationsarkitektur i en hybrid- och molnbaserad miljö
* driva tekniska vägval och arkitekturprinciper inom integrationsområdet
* delta i utvecklingen och moderniseringen av vår integrationsplattform
* utföra och leda POC:er för att utvärdera nya tekniska lösningar
* stötta utvecklingsteam i design av robusta och skalbara integrationslösningar
* bidra till lösningar kring observability, säkerhet och governance inom integration
* samarbeta med arkitekter, utvecklare och verksamhetsrepresentanter kring integrations- och molnfrågor


 För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du har:
   

  

* erfarenhet av att arbeta som integrationsarkitekt eller senior integrationsutvecklare
* gedigen erfarenhet av integrationslösningar i både moln- och on-prem-miljöer
* erfarenhet av hybridintegration mellan molnplattformar och traditionella system
* erfarenhet av integrationsmönster såsom API-baserad integration, messaging eller eventdriven arkitektur
* erfarenhet av loggning och monitorering i Azure eller annan molnplattform
* god förståelse för nätverk och säkerhet i distribuerade system
* erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
* erfarenhet av CI/CD-verktyg, exempelvis Azure DevOps
* goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift


 Det är meriterande om du även har erfarenhet av:
   

  

* Azure Integration Services (till exempel Logic Apps, Service Bus eller API Management)
* molnagnostiska lösningar eller drift i miljöer med flera leverantörer
* autentiserings- och auktoriseringslösningar i integrationsscenarion
* modernisering eller migrering från äldre integrationsplattformar
* arbete enligt SAFe eller andra agila arbetssätt


 Som person är du analytisk och lösningsorienterad, med ett genuint intresse för arkitektur och tekniska lösningar. Du har lätt för att samarbeta med olika roller och kan kommunicera komplexa tekniska frågor på ett tydligt sätt.
   

  

 Du trivs i en miljö där du får kombinera strategiskt tänkande med praktiskt tekniskt arbete och där du får vara med och påverka hur framtidens integrationsplattform ska utvecklas.
   

  

**Om oss**
 LF är ett företag i ständig utveckling där vi satsar stort på digitalisering, molnteknologi och datadrivna arbetssätt.
   

  

 Teamet Integration Platform Services ansvarar för integrationsplattformen och möjliggör säker och effektiv informationsförsörjning mellan system i hela organisationen. Vi arbetar i en hybrid integrationsarkitektur där både molnbaserade och on-prem-lösningar samverkar. Som en del av vår moderniseringsresa pågår även ett arbete med att successivt avveckla vår BizTalk-plattform och ersätta den med moderna integrationslösningar i Azure.
   

  

 Hos oss får du en stimulerande arbetsmiljö där samarbete, innovation och teknisk utveckling står i fokus.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter**
 Rekryterande chef: karin.segerstrom@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: lisa-maria.carensjo@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Digital & IT är hjärtat i Länsförsäkringsgruppens digitala utveckling. Vi driver den gemensamma digitala transformationen och levererar förstklassiga IT-lösningar, datadrivna insikter och innovativa digitala tjänster som skapar värde för hela verksamheten. Vårt uppdrag är att bygga en robust och framtidssäker IT-miljö – både på plats och i molnet – som möjliggör kundnära och effektiva affärer i hela gruppen.
   

  

 Hos oss möts teknik, affär och innovation. Vi arbetar tvärfunktionellt ute i verksamheten i agila team där utveckling, drift och strategi går hand i hand. Vi ansvarar för allt från IT-styrning, enterprisearkitektur och leverantörshantering till applikationsutveckling, cybersäkerhet och verksamhetsberedskap.

title: Idé till digital lösning
description:
**Utmaning & mål**  

När en ny strålskyddslag trädde i kraft innebar det att betydligt fler verksamheter – som tandläkare, veterinärer och arbetsplatser med radon – omfattades av anmälningsplikt. Strålsäkerhetsmyndighetens dåvarande, manuella process med posthantering var inte längre hållbar. Myndigheten behövde en digital lösning som kunde lanseras i tid för att uppfylla det nya lagkravet – med krav på säkerhet, skalbarhet och användarvänlighet.


**Lösning**  

Agero satte samman ett erfaret team med arkitekt, utvecklare och UX-designer som kunde arbeta effektivt från dag ett. Lösningen som togs fram omfattade både ett gränssnitt för verksamheter som skulle göra anmälningar och ett verktyg för myndighetens handläggare att hantera dem. Systemet integrerades med bland annat BankID för säker inloggning och möjliggjorde fakturering direkt i samband med anmälan.



Arbetet bedrevs agilt i tvåveckorssprintar med löpande demos och prioriteringar tillsammans med kunden, vilket gjorde att teamet kunde hålla ett högt tempo utan att tumma på kvaliteten.


**Resultat**  

Efter fem månader var systemet i drift – lagkravet var uppfyllt, och myndigheten hade ett hållbart och förvaltningsbart system på plats. Användarupplevelsen förbättrades markant, både för de verksamheter som gör anmälningar och för de handläggare som behandlar dem.



***”Att projektet skulle gå i mål och bli så här bra var inget vi vågade hoppas på. Det enda tråkiga är att vi inte får fortsätta jobba med teamet från Agero.”***



– Melina Assadpur, Projektledare, Strålsäkerhetsmyndigheten
company_description: Our mission is to transform the driving experience through an unmatched combination of innovative technology and human-powered solutions.

title: VFX Internship
description:
Hology Interactive is revolutionizing 3D development to make it easier for creators, educators, web developers, designers, and artists to build projects and experiences for everyone to enjoy using web technologies. We are seeking passionate and innovative student interns to join our team and craft immersive 3D experiences using our proprietary Hology Engine. This internship offers a unique opportunity to gain invaluable hands-on experience in the rapidly evolving field of interactive 3D technology while contributing to our product's development.
 



  





 We are looking for a VFX artist intern for our PC game demo project, the art direction is stylized art/Japanese anime.
 



  





  




* Contribute to environmental and some character visual effects that enhance gameplay and player immersion. You will be able to include specific approved VFX you worked on in your personal portfolio upon completion of the full contracted internship period.
* Collaborate with our programmer to design dynamic, cinematic, and optimized VFX
* Develop and implement effects that support gameplay. The art direction is stylized art
* Give feedback to our existing game engine and assist in testing features
* Research on specific subject matter topics for VFX inspirations and more
* Assist in getting feedback from gameplay testers to improve the VFX
* Assists with tutorial creation and documentation for the game engine on VFX related topics



  





**Technical Skills and Experience** 




  




* Flexible to adapt to new game engines and tools such as Affinity and Blender
* Ability to follow and match an established art direction
* Familiarity with version control tools such as GitHub



  





**Bonus:** 
 simple rigging and animation in Blender, and/or web programming experience (TypeScript/JavaScript)
 



  





**Personal Attributes** 



* Adaptability and enthusiasm for exploring diverse technologies and tools
* Strong self-motivation and ability to work independently
* Exceptional problem-solving skills and meticulous attention to detail
* Curious and willing to deep dive with research into specific subject matter
* Ability to accept feedback and follow directions



  





**Additional Details** 



* Duration: 3 months internship or 6 months LIA
* You have to be a student who needs LIA or internship credit for a university or vocational school
* Location: This is remote work with some possible in-person events/meetings in Stockholm
* Start Date: May or June, 2026. Negotiable
* Flexible work hours with prior agreement
* Days off in accordance with your institution's policy
* Mentorships on shaders, concept development, UX design for VFX, CV review, research methods, and more subject specific matter
* The working language is English. Bonus: knowledge of Swedish or Japanese



 Contact Us
 



  





 Please send your CV in PDF format and portfolio link to hello@hology.app with the subject line “
 **(Your Name):** 
**Summer VFX Internship.**

title: Integration Developer
description:
**INTEGRATION DEVELOPER**
 Would you like to work in an international environment where you’ll make a difference every day? At Permobil, we’re looking for game-changers to join us as we innovate for individuals and develop the world’s most advanced assistive solutions.
   

  

 At
 **Permobil** 
 , the people who use our products come first. Our purpose is to create advanced assistive solutions that make the lives of adults and children living with disabilities more enriching. Our people are passionate about pushing the boundaries of technology to deliver innovations that improve lives. We are a sustainable and responsible business committed to continuous improvement, and our customers can trust us to provide market-leading solutions driven by insights-based clinical data.
   

  

**Position Overview**
 As an
 **Integration Developer** 
 at Permobil, you will serve as the vital link between our business systems and the AI platform. You will design and maintain secure, scalable connectors that integrate our large language model (LLM) services with key tools such as Dynamics 365, SharePoint Online, Teams, Fabric, and Power Platform, enabling truly actionable AI across the organization. If you thrive on solving complex data and API challenges within Microsoft’s cloud ecosystem, this role places you at the heart of innovation and digital transformation.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design and build robust integrations between Azure AI services and enterprise systems (CRM, HR, ERP, IoT),
* Create reusable APIs, plugins, and Power Automate connectors to let agents execute business workflows,
* Develop logic apps, webhooks, and middleware using Azure Functions, API Management, and Service Bus,
* Implement secure data access using Managed Identities, Entra ID, and role-based access control,
* Monitor integration performance with Azure Monitor, Application Insights, and Log Analytics,
* Work closely with Python and UX teams to expose function-calling endpoints for AI functions.


**Qualifications & Skills**
* Master/Bachelor Degree in Computer Science or similar education,
* 4+ years of experience with Azure integration services (API Management, Logic Apps, Functions, Service Bus),
* Proficiency in C#, Python, or Node.js for backend/middleware development,
* Hands-on experience with Microsoft Graph API, Dynamics 365 APIs, or SharePoint REST APIs,
* Familiarity with Power Platform (Power Automate, Power Apps) for workflow automation,
* Solid understanding of REST / GraphQL API standards, authentication, and data security,
* Experience in enterprise system integration and change management,
* Experience in agile methodologies,
* Fluent in English; proficiency in Swedish is a plus.


**Meriting Skills**
* Experience with LangChain Tool Calling or OpenAI function calling patterns,
* Knowledge of event-driven architectures and Event Grid,
* Familiarity with Azure DevOps Pipelines and GitOps workflows.


**Who are you?**
 You inspire and motivate those around you, building strong collaboration and clear communication with stakeholders at every level. You actively encourage experimentation, viewing each new attempt as an opportunity for growth. You understand that failure is a stepping stone to success, helping to create an environment where curiosity, learning, and innovation are always encouraged.
   

  

**Why is Permobil the next step for you?**
* You’ll make a difference. Every day. Everything we do leads to understanding and improving the lives of our users. Through our evidence-based innovation, we make a difference to people’s lives.
* You’ll make your mark as part of our future. We collaborate with colleagues across borders to Innovate for Individuals. The impact you make personally could lead change around the world.
* You’ll feel welcome from day one. We’re known for being great colleagues, who are collaborative, fun and at the cutting-edge. Everyone at Permobil cares as much as you do about making a positive difference.


**Application Process**
 We will conduct selection continuously so send us your application today or before
 **December 5th** 
 at the latest!
   

  

 Permobil is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity and inclusion. We welcome applications from all qualified individuals.
   

  

 For more information about the position, please contact Christoffer Stigson, Director Digital Transformation, christoffer.stigson@permobil.com
   

  

 For information about the recruitment process, please contact Zivile Mitkute, Talent Acquisition Partner, zivile.mitkute@permobil.com
   

  

**Please respect that we do not wish recruitment assistance or advertising, we decline calls from recruitment and advertising providers.**
**More About Permobil**
 Permobil founder Dr. Per Uddén believed that helping people achieve the greatest level of independence is a basic human right and, for over 50 years, Permobil has held fast to that belief. Permobil is a global leader in advanced rehabilitation technology, passionate about better understanding our users’ needs and improving their quality of life through state-of-the-art healthcare solutions. Today, those solutions include power wheelchairs, seating and positioning products, power assist, and manual wheelchairs.
   

  

 Permobil is part of Patricia Industries, a subsidiary of Investor AB, and is headquartered in Sweden. Permobil has 2 000 team members in 18 countries around the world. For more information regarding the company’s storied history and complete product line, visit permobil.com.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description:
**About Remote**
----------------


Remote is solving modern organizations' biggest challenge – navigating global employment compliantly with ease. We make it possible for businesses of all sizes to recruit, pay, and manage international teams. With our core values at heart and future focused work culture, our team works tirelessly on ambitious problems, asynchronously, around the world. You can find Remoters working from 6 different continents (Antarctica left to go!) and all of our positions are fully remote.  

  

With Innovation as one of the core values, we have built Automation and AI capabilities into the requirements for every role.  

  

We encourage every member of the Remote team to bring their talents, experiences and culture to the table to help us build the best-in-class HR platform.

If you are energetic, curious, motivated and ambitious, be part of our world. Apply now and define the future of work!**The position**
----------------



You'll be joining a team of engineers across Frontend, Backend, SRE and QA. We're organised into cross-functional development teams assigned to specific verticals.



This role is open for several teams, and we will define the exact team that you will be joining during the interview process based on the business needs and your preferences.



Regardless of the specific team, you will be working on building tools, APIs and integrations for one of our products.



Our backend is built with Elixir and Phoenix, with a Postgres database. We use React and Next.js for our front-end. GitLab is used as a version control tool and a CI/CD solution. Our applications are hosted on AWS. We fully rely on our CI for deployments and deploy multiple times per day. You can check out our Engineering Rulebook to learn more.


**What this job can offer you**
-------------------------------


* Complex and meaningful challenges — solving them will enable people and businesses to live and operate in any country of the world.
* Opportunity to have a significant impact on the business — we are still very early in our journey as a company, and each change you make today is amplified by the company's growth.
* A lot of freedom to organize your work and life — you are not bound to daily standups, recurring meetings or other ceremonies.
* Competitive salary, stock options, unlimited PTO and a set of perks and benefits.
* A supportive and kind work environment where we would like you to challenge the dogmas and pursue innovation!
* Strong team of experienced engineers who will support and facilitate your professional growth.

**What you bring**
------------------


**Must have (professional experience):**


* Strong engineering fundamentals and a track record of shipping production systems that are secure, reliable, and scalable.
* Practical experience designing or adopting agentic/automation workflows (or comparable systems) and improving them through iteration.
* Ability to think in systems: define specs clearly, break down plans, instrument verification, and close the loop on quality.
* Postgres (or similar).
* CI/CD (GitLab, GitHub, Jenkins or similar).


**Nice to have**


* Experience with Functional Programming languages such as Elixir, Erlang, Scala, Clojure, Haskell, etc.
* Kubernetes
* Docker
* AWS
* Nextjs
* React/Vue/Angular

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------


* Lead the development of major team-scoped projects, participate in cross-team initiatives for Remote's HR and Payroll products.
* Actively participate in product work in the team: provide feedback, suggest solutions to the problems. Use technical insights and expertise to suggest product improvements.
* Maintain good understanding of the team's domain, both from product and engineering sides.
* Provide feedback on code reviews.
* Contribute to the shared codebase.
* Debug and solve technical and business issues.
* Participate in non-team activities, such as support rotations, hiring process, RFC discussions, etc.
* Mentor and provide guidance to other engineers.
* Investigate, propose and participate in implementation of improvements to our platform.
* Implement interfaces with performance, accessibility, and API design in mind.
* Redesign how engineering work ships with autonomous agents as the default execution layer.
* Propose and operationalize agentic workflows end-to-end (spec plan execute verify) to deliver outcomes faster.
* Build reusable agentic workflows and primitives in the codebase so teams can apply them repeatedly across domains.
* Use verification loops (tests, checks, evals, guardrails) to ensure results are correct, secure, reliable, and scalable.

**Practicals**
--------------


* **Team:** Engineering
* **Location**: Anywhere in the World
* **Start date**: As soon as possible

**Application process**
-----------------------


* Interview with our Recruiter


* Interview with an Engineering Leader


* (async) Code exercise and review


* Interview with members of the engineering team


* Bar Raiser interview


* Executive interview


* Offer + Prior employment verification check


**Benefits**
------------


Our full benefits & perks are explained in our handbook at remote.com/r/benefits. As a global company, each country works differently, but some benefits/perks are for all Remoters:
* work from anywhere
* flexible paid time off
* flexible working hours (we are async)
* 16 weeks paid parental leave
* mental health support services
* stock options
* learning budget
* home office budget & IT equipment
* budget for local in-person social events or co-working spaces
**How you'll plan your day (and life)**
---------------------------------------



We work async at Remote which means you can plan your schedule around your life (and not around meetings). Read more at remote.com/async.



You will be empowered to take ownership and be proactive. When in doubt you will default to action instead of waiting. Your **life-work balance** is important and you will be encouraged to put yourself and your family first, and fit work around your needs.



If that sounds like something you want, apply now!


**How to apply**
----------------


* Please fill out the form below and upload your CV with a PDF format.


* **We kindly ask you to submit your application and CV in English, as this is the standardised language we use here at Remote.**


* If you don't have an up to date CV but you are still interested in talking to us, please feel free to add a copy of your LinkedIn profile instead.



Not only do we encourage folks from all ethnic groups, genders, sexuality, age, abilities, disability status and any other under-represented group to apply, but we prioritize a sense of belonging. We have 4 ERGs (Women, Disability, Queer, Minorities in Tech) who meet regularly with the People team. During your interviews and beyond, we ask & encourage anybody who needs an accommodation to request one from their recruiter.

  


We will ask you to voluntarily tell us your pronouns at interview stage, and you will have the option to answer our anonymous demographic questionnaire when you apply below. As an equal employment opportunity employer it's important to us that our workforce reflects people of all backgrounds, identities, and experiences and this data will help us to stay accountable. We thank you for providing this data, if you chose to.



At Remote, we embrace AI as a valuable tool while prioritizing human creativity and authenticity. We look forward to meeting candidates who balance innovation with genuine expertise and experience. To learn more about Remote's AI guidelines check see here.  

  

*Please note we accept applications on an ongoing basis.*

title: Head of IT & Digital Infrastructure
description:
**Build the digital backbone of a deep-tech company scaling globally**
----------------------------------------------------------------------


At **Smart High Tech**, we are solving one of the most critical bottlenecks in modern electronics: heat.


Our graphene-based materials enable the next generation of **AI systems, data centres, and high-performance electronics**.


We are now entering a decisive phase — moving from **R&D to industrial-scale production and global commercialisation**.


To enable this, we are seeking a Head of IT & Digital Infrastructure to build, integrate, and scale the company's digital foundation.

**Your mission**
----------------


This is not a traditional IT role.


You will:

* Build a **secure, scalable, and integrated IT ecosystem**
* Connect **production, quality, and business systems**
* Enable **data-driven decision-making across the organisation**
* Ensure our infrastructure supports **international growth and multi-site operations**


You will be a key enabler in taking the company from  

**innovation industrialization global scale**

**What you will do**
--------------------

### **1. IT Infrastructure & Digital Platform**

* Own and develop the full IT environment (Microsoft 365, network, devices, access)
* Define a scalable architecture for **multi-site and international operations**
* Ensure stability, security, and usability across the organisation

### **2. Industrial IT & Production Integration (Critical)**

* Build and integrate IT systems supporting production (shopfloor IT)
* Connect:


	+ ERP
	+ MES / light MES
	+ QMS
* Enable **traceability, data capture, and efficient production flows**

### **3. Data & Decision Support**

* Establish data structures and reporting frameworks
* Build dashboards for:


	+ production performance (yield, throughput)
	+ quality metrics
	+ cost per unit
* Support leadership with **actionable insights**

### **4. IT Security & IP Protection**

* Protect sensitive technology and R&D data
* Implement access control and security architecture
* Enable secure collaboration with **international partners**

### **5. Systems Integration & Automation**

* Lead ERP and business system implementations
* Automize manual workflows and processes
* Drive digital efficiency across the organisation

### **6. Web & Digital Presence**

* Own and manage web platforms (WordPress or similar)
* Ensure performance, security, and continuous development

### **7. Vendor & Cost Management**

* Manage IT vendors and partners
* Optimise licensing, contracts, and cost structures

### **8. Strategic Role**

* Work closely with the **CEO and management**
* Act as a **digital enabler for production scale-up and growth**

**Who you are**
---------------


We are not looking for a maintainer.  

We are looking for a **builder and scaler**.


You:

* Have built or significantly transformed IT environments in **growth or scale-up companies**
* Understand the intersection of **technology, production, and business value**
* Thrive in environments where structure is missing — and **create it**
* Are both **strategic and hands-on**

**Experience**
--------------

* Microsoft 365 / modern workplace (incl. security)
* IT infrastructure and architecture
* System integration (ERP, production systems, data)
* Web platforms (e.g. WordPress)
* IT security and access management

**Meritorious**
---------------

* Experience from:


	+ manufacturing / industrial environments
	+ scale-ups or transformation journeys
	+ international organizations
* MES / QMS / ERP integration
* Data platforms, BI, or analytics

**Personal qualities**
----------------------

* Entrepreneurial and solution-oriented
* Structured with strong execution capability
* High ownership and integrity
* Ability to build trust across teams

**Why join Smart High Tech?**
-----------------------------


This is a rare opportunity to:

* Build the **entire digital backbone** of a deep-tech company
* Work at the intersection of **AI, materials science, and industrial scale**
* Have **real ownership and impact**, not just responsibility
* Shape how technology enables production, quality, and growth

**What success looks like**
---------------------------


Within 6–12 months, you have:

* Built a **robust, scalable IT architecture**
* Enabled **data-driven production and quality control**
* Secured **IP and digital infrastructure**
* Created a foundation for **global expansion**


We are not only hiring for experience.  

We are hiring for **mindset, ownership, and ambition**.

title: LFV rekryterar systemförvaltare- systemingenjör
description:
Är du en senior Linuxspecialist som vill ta helhetsansvar för en affärskritisk plattform och bidra till långsiktig teknisk stabilitet och utveckling? Då kan du vara den vi söker till vårt team! Vi leder flyget - i takt med tiden, i alla lägen. LFV är Sveriges ledande aktör inom flygtrafikledning för civil och militär luftfart med tillhörande tjänster. Vi erbjuder flygtrafikledning och relaterade tjänster både nationellt och internationellt. Våra flygledare leder dagligen cirka 2 000 flygplan i svenskt luftrum. LFV var först i världen med flygtrafikledning på distans och vi driver digitaliseringen inom flera områden. Genom olika samarbeten är vi med och effektiviserar det europeiska luftrummet. Läs mer om LFV här www.lfv.se
   

  

**Om oss**
 Som systemförvaltare inom Teknik Operations arbetar du inom ett brett område med system- och förvaltningsfrågor. Du kommer att vara en del av en förvaltningsgrupp och arbetet bedrivs tillsammans med andra kollegor och samarbetspartners. Du kommer tillhöra avdelningen System och Utveckling. Avdelningen System och Utveckling (SoU) bedriver kommunikations-, navigations-, och övervakningstjänster. SoU ansvarar även för LFV s administrativa informationsteknologi, utvecklingsverksamhet samt systemplanering och anskaffning. Avdelningen ansvarar för LFV s tekniska utrustningar för flygtrafikledning, flygbriefingtjänst och flygvädertjänst.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
 Vill du bidra till en stabil och hållbar förvaltning av samhällskritiska system? Som senior systemförvaltare med inriktning mot Linux och containerbaserade systemplattformar arbetar du med den tekniska förvaltningen av flyginformationssystem inom luftfartsområdet. Du blir en del av ett team som arbetar för att skapa en robust och professionell förvaltningsförmåga av systemen, där samarbete mellan verksamhet, teknik och leverantörer är centralt och där kvalitet, tydlighet och ansvar genomsyrar allt arbete.
   

  

 Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter innebär att
   

  

* Säkerställa teknisk kvalitet, stabilitet och långsiktig hållbarhet inom Linuxdelen av plattformen
* Granska, analysera och kvalitetssäkra tekniska förändringar innan införande
* Identifiera, initiera och driva förbättringar kopplat till robusthet, prestanda, övervakning och säkerhet
* Kravställa och följa upp leveranser från externa leverantörer
* Aktivt bidra i change- och releaseprocesser enligt etablerade arbetssätt
* Genomföra riskbedömningar och rotorsaksanalyser vid incidenter eller avvikelser
* Dokumentera och arbeta strukturerat, transparent och spårbart
* Dela kunskap och stötta mer juniora kollegor, samt bidra till uppbyggnaden av intern kompetens


 Rollen ger dig möjlighet att bidra med din erfarenhet, stabilitet och långsiktighet i en komplex och reglerad miljö, samtidigt som du utvecklar både plattformen och teamets förvaltningsförmåga.
   

  

**Din profil**
 Vi ser att du har akademisk utbildning så som ex ingenjörsutbildning eller har förvärvat motsvarande kompetens på annat sätt. Du har senior Linuxkompetens och mångårig erfarenhet av arbete i produktionsmiljö. Vidare har du dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete i en systemförvaltningsorganisation samt god vana av att arbeta i ärendehanteringssystem
   

  

 Du har god förståelse för containerbaserade miljöer, exempelvis Docker och Kubernetes. Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av att arbeta med och kravställa mot extern drift- och systemleverantör, samt erfarenhet av förändringshantering i reglerad eller säkerhetskritisk miljö. Erfarenhet från myndighet är också meriterande, liksom kunskap om ITIL och pm3 samt erfarenhet av att delta i eller driva CAB. Du har god kommunikativ förmåga och uttrycker dig obehindrat i tal och skrift på både svenska och engelska.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som är trygg i din tekniska kompetens och gärna delar med dig av den. Du är lösningsorienterad och målinriktad, tar ansvar för helheten och ser till att strukturen upprätthålls även när tempot är högt. Med god riskmedvetenhet och respekt för regelverk och säkerhet skapar du effektiva och långsiktiga lösningar. Du har dessutom god samarbetsförmåga och arbetar prestigelöst i teamet.
   

  

 Stor vikt kommer att läggas på personlig lämplighet.
   

  

**Övrig information**
 Placeringsort I första hand Norrköping eller Stockholm Arlanda, men även Malmö Sturup kan vara aktuellt.
   

  

 Innan anställning genomför LFV en säkerhetsprövning som bland annat innefattar registerkontroll, säkerhetsintervju och drogtest. Denna tjänst kräver svenskt medborgarskap.
   

  

 Vi värdesätter mångfald och vi tror att olika perspektiv gör oss bättre. Vår rekryteringsprocess är kompetensbaserad och innehåller urval, tester och intervjuer, vilket säkerställer att alla kandidater behandlas lika och rättvist.
   

  

 Sista ansökningsdag 12 April 2026
   

  

**Kontakt**
 I den här rekryteringen samarbetar LFV med Jeffersonwells. Vi tar inte emot ansökan på mail pga av GDPR och vi vill ha ditt cv på svenska. Vid frågor är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryteringskonsult Therese Fyhr, 011-191898, Therese.fyhr@jeffersonwells.se.
   

  

**Facklig kontakt**
**Johan Mälman**
**Facklig kontakt ST**
**011-19 20 00**
**Christian Axelsson**
**Facklig kontakt SACO**
**011-19 20 00**
 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Technology Operations Manager
description:
**About us** 




 Xanh SM is a leading electric vehicle (EV) and sustainable mobility solutions provider headquartered in Vietnam. With a commitment to transforming urban transportation, we have successfully expanded into the Global Market and are now preparing to launch operations in the EU Market. Join us in driving the future of sustainable mobility.
 



  





 Website:
 
 Xanh SM - Electric Mobility Service, 5-Star Quality | Xanh SM
 




  





**Position Overview** 




 The IT Operations Manager is responsible for ensuring the stable, secure, and efficient operation of the company’s technology infrastructure in the local market. This role oversees IT systems, network infrastructure, and technical support services to ensure seamless operations of the ride-hailing platform for both internal teams and end users.
 



  





**Job Description** 




**Role Purpose:** 




 The IT Operations Manager is responsible for ensuring the stable, secure, and efficient operation of the company’s technology infrastructure in the local market. This role oversees IT systems, network infrastructure, and technical support services to ensure seamless operations of the ride-hailing platform for both internal teams and end users.
 



**Key Responsibilities:** 




**IT Infrastructure & Systems Management** 



* Manage and maintain servers, network systems, and related databases to ensure system reliability and performance.
* Monitor system health, uptime, and performance to ensure high availability of the platform and supporting systems.
* Coordinate with global technology teams to implement infrastructure standards and system upgrades.



**Information Security & Compliance** 



* Implement and maintain information security policies and procedures to protect customer data and internal systems.
* Monitor and respond to potential security risks, vulnerabilities, or incidents.
* Ensure compliance with data protection regulations and internal security standards.



**Technical Support & Incident Management** 



* Provide IT helpdesk support for internal teams and operational staff.
* Diagnose and resolve technical incidents and system issues affecting platform operations.
* Coordinate with product and engineering teams to escalate and resolve complex technical problems.
* Establish incident response framework including severity levels (P0, P1, etc.), escalation paths, and on-call rotation.
* Lead post-incident reviews and root cause analysis (RCA) for major outages to prevent recurrence.
* Ensure real-time operational readiness for business-critical services affecting drivers, passengers, and internal teams.



**IT Asset & Vendor Management** 



* Manage the procurement, deployment, and lifecycle of IT equipment and technology assets.
* Maintain inventory of hardware, software licenses, and IT resources.
* Work with vendors and service providers to ensure reliable technology solutions and support services.



**Technology Operations Support** 



* Support the local operation of the ride-hailing platform and related digital products.
* Ensure technology systems support driver onboarding, customer operations, and internal business processes.
* Collaborate with Operations, Product, and Global IT teams to optimize system performance in the local market.
* Define and manage SLA/SLO targets for critical systems to guarantee high availability and customer satisfaction.
* Collaborate with engineering teams on CI/CD processes to ensure smooth deployments with minimal downtime.



  





**Qualifications:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
* 5–8 years of experience in IT operations, system administration, or infrastructure management.
* Experience working with cloud infrastructure, networking systems, and enterprise IT environments.
* Familiarity with security best practices and data protection standards.
* Experience in technology-driven companies, ride-hailing or mobility platforms, or fast-growing digital businesses is preferred.


- 


**Contact:** 
**Hai Anh Nguyen, Global Talent Acquisition Manager** 




 Email: v.anhnth94@xanhsm.com
 



  





*We appreciate your interest in this opportunity. Given the high volume of applications, we will only be able to contact shortlisted candidates. We value your understanding and patience in this process. Thank you for your interest and cooperation.*

title: Data Analyst
description:
**Company Description** 




 FJORNIX helps businesses in Sweden and beyond drive innovation through advanced technology solutions. We specialize in cloud services, cybersecurity, digital transformation, and software development, ensuring that our offerings are scalable and aligned with client goals. With a combination of global expertise and local insight, we empower startups and established enterprises to optimize operations and unlock new opportunities. Guided by trust and a forward-thinking approach, FJORNIX is dedicated to preparing businesses for the challenges and possibilities of tomorrow.
 



  




**📢 Vi söker: Senior Data Analyst (Konsult) – Solna | På plats | Apr–Sep 2026** 

 Vill du arbeta nära verksamheten i en organisation som satsar på datadrivna arbetssätt och befinner sig i en spännande transformation mot molnbaserade lösningar (GCP)? Nu söker vi en
 **Senior Data Analyst** 
 som vill bidra med expertis inom datamodellering, datalager och avancerad analys.
 



**📍 Plats:** 
 Solna
 



**📅 Uppdragsperiod:** 
 20 april 2026 – 30 september 2026
 



**🧑‍💻 Distans:** 
 0% (på plats)
 



  




**🔍 Om uppdraget** 

 I rollen får du arbeta med stora och komplexa datamängder, samtidigt som du är delaktig i att forma moderna och skalbara dataflöden. Du arbetar tätt tillsammans med både data engineers och verksamhetsnära team för att göra data strukturerad, tillförlitlig och värdefull för beslutsstöd.
 


**🛠️ Arbetsuppgifter** 

 Du kommer att arbeta tvärfunktionellt och täcka hela analysens värdekedja:
 


* Identifiera och definiera analysbehov tillsammans med verksamheten
* Insamling, bearbetning och modellering av data
* Utveckla och transformera data i datalager
* Bygga skalbara och högkvalitativa datapipelines
* Skapa semantiska modeller för självserviceanalys
* Visualisera och kommunicera insikter till olika intressenter
* Bidra till teamets gemensamma arbetssätt och kunskapsdelning


**✅ Kvalifikationskrav** 
* Minst 5 års relevant erfarenhet inom data/analys
* Mycket god kunskap i
 **SQL**
* Erfarenhet av
 **dbt** 
 inom datamodellering och transformation
* Erfarenhet av
 **semantiska modeller** 
 (gärna i Looker)
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


**✨ Meriterande kompetenser** 
* Looker (semantisk modellering)
* Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
* GitHub
* BigQuery
* Tableau
* Connected Sheets


**👤 Personliga egenskaper** 

 För att trivas i rollen är du analytisk, affärsmässig och ansvarstagande. Du har en god förmåga att växla mellan detaljer och helhetsperspektiv, och du är kommunikativ och pedagogisk i ditt sätt att förklara data för olika typer av mottagare.
 



 Du trivs i miljöer där IT och verksamhet möts – och du uppskattar att dela kunskap och coacha andra.

title: IT Service Owner till Ambea
description:
**Nu söker vi en IT Service Owner till Ambeakoncernens huvudkontor i Solna.**
 Ambea är Nordens kunskapsledande omsorgsföretag. Vi verkar genom varumärkena Nytida, Vardaga, Stendi, Altiden, Validia och Klara, och bedriver utbildningsverksamhet inom Lära. Genomgående i våra verksamheter erbjuder vi boende, stöd, utbildning och bemanning inom vård och omsorg. Vi har cirka 38 000 medarbetare på mer än 1000 enheter i Sverige, Norge, Danmark och Finland. Vi ska vara kvalitetsledande i allt vi gör och vår vision är att göra världen lite bättre, en människa i taget. Hos oss kan du utvecklas samtidigt som du gör skillnad för andra. Läs gärna mer
   

  

**Ditt uppdrag**
 Som IT Service Owner vid Applications blir du en viktig teammedlem i vår Nordiska grupp som består av seniora och mediora medarbetare. Vi arbetar Nordiskt med Applikationsförvaltning och utveckling enligt ITIL där vi utför operativa, taktiska och ibland strategiska aktiviteter – din erfarenhet gör att du förstår vad som skiljer ditt ansvar för att lösa dagliga ärenden och hur vi underlättar hantering genom lathundar eller kunskapsartiklar som påverkar applikationens status.
   

  

 Din arbetsvecka karaktäriseras av varierande arbetsuppgifter inom teamets domäner/områden med hantering av dagliga ärenden i vårt ärendehanteringssystem.
   

  

 Du jobbar smart genom att proaktivt analysera och påverka insatser för underhåll och utveckling av våra IT-system på koncernnivå i nära relation med övriga IT-kollegor och kollegor vid Verksamhetsutveckling, Affärsområden eller koncerngemensamma stödfunktioner som Inköp, Marknad och Kvalitet.
   

  

**Din erfarenhet och kunskap**
 Vi söker en verksamhetsnära applikationsförvaltare med relevant högskoleutbildning och flera års erfarenhet av att arbeta nära verksamheten i roller där ansvar för systemstöd, processer och leverans varit central. Du har god erfarenhet av att arbeta med verksamhetssystem som används i det dagliga arbetet i organisationen och i samverkan med externa parter eller kunder.
   

  

 I rollen ansvarar du för förvaltning och vidareutveckling av applikationer utifrån verksamhetens behov. Det innebär att du arbetar strukturerat med backlogg, prioriteringar och förbättringsinitiativ samt säkerställer att lösningar implementeras på ett hållbart och ändamålsenligt sätt. Du tar ett tydligt ägarskap för dina ansvarsområden och driver arbetet från behovsanalys och uppstart till leverans och uppföljning.
   

  

 Du är van att koordinera flera intressenter samtidigt, både internt och externt, och trivs i en roll där självständighet, gott omdöme och ansvarstagande är avgörande. Du bidrar aktivt till att utveckla arbetssätt, identifierar förbättringsmöjligheter i processer och informationsflöden och omsätter idéer till praktiska lösningar. Dokumentation, kunskapsöverföring och utbildningsinsatser är en naturlig del av ditt arbete för att säkerställa skalbarhet och långsiktig förvaltning.
   

  

 Vi söker ytterligare en kollega som uppskattar vår kultur och inspireras av våra värderingar – respekt, ansvar, enkelhet och kunskap. Om ovan även stämmer in på dig hoppas vi att du har ett gott humör, spännande fritidsintressen och som person gärna deltar i dialoger med lösningsfokus, analytisk förmåga och mycket god kommunikationsförmåga.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder**
* Ledarskapsutbildade chefer – samtliga chefer går vårt ledarprogram.
* Karriär- och utvecklingsmöjligheter – vårt mål är att 7 av 10 personer ska kunna internrekryteras till chefs- eller specialistroller.
* Utbildning via vår egna utbildningsorganisation Lära – t ex att leda utan att vara chef, utbildning för dig som ska utbilda andra, rehabilitering, arbetsrätt, utvecklingssamtal och arbetsmiljö.


*Vi har självklart även kollektivavtal, förmånsportal, tjänstepension, försäkringar och friskvårdsbidrag.*
**Om oss**
 Sedan mars 2025 finns vi i våra nya, moderna lokaler i Origo på Röntgenvägen 3 – med direkt närhet till kommunikationer i Sundbybergs centrum. Du kan läsa mer om våra lokaler här.
   

  

 Vi ses kontinuerligt i trevliga sammanhang såsom afterwork, fester, alzheimerloppet och andra tillfällen. Vi har omsorgstagare som praktiserar på vårt huvudkontor med allt ifrån administration till facility management för att få möjlighet till utveckling.
   

  

 Alla chefer genomgår ett gediget ledarskapsprogram där syftet är att skapa ett gemensamt språk och syn på ledarskap. Vi vill ha ledare som är ansvarstagande, skapar tydlighet och delaktighet, coachar, ger och tar emot feedback, är prestigelösa och affärsmässiga.
   

  

**Övrigt**
 Anställningsform: Tillsvidare med 6 månaders provanställning
   

  

 Lön: Vi tillämpar individuell lönesättning
   

  

 Tillträdesdag: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-04-10
   

  

 För mer information kontakta: dina kontaktuppgifter
   

  

 Registerkontroll: Utdrag ur belastningsregister skall uppvisas vid en eventuell anställning Som en del av vårt arbetsmiljöarbete kan slumpmässiga drogtester förekomma.
   

  

 Facklig kontakt: Vision, Magnus Sällström, vision@ambea.se
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Välkommen att ansöka via knappen ”Skicka ansökan” nedan. Vänta inte med att ansöka då vi gör urval löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag.
   

  

 Om du blir kallad till en intervju behöver du kunna styrka att du har rätt att arbeta i Sverige, genom att uppvisa att du har medborgarskap inom EU/EES eller ett giltigt arbetstillstånd.

title: Date Center Technician, Data Center Operations
description:
**Description**
 AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.
   

  

 You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.
   

  

 We are looking for Data Center Technicians to join our expanding Infrastructure Operations team. Data Center Technicians are the primary resolver and troubleshoot and solve a range of data center infrastructure issues including, but not limited to: hardware, fiber, networking, and related problems. You will be part of the Data Center Operations (DCO) team, overseeing the operation and maintenance of the IT infrastructure and hardware for data centers in AWS Cloud regions. You will become the primary resolver for your support team, and gain troubleshooting skills on different hardware and software cases. You will be able to troubleshoot and solve most infrastructure issues and engage other appropriate solutions groups on more complex problems to drive solutions.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

**Skills**
 This is a customer-facing role that requires strong technical, communication, and problem-solving skills. Your activities will include (but not limited to):
   

  

* Build relationships with internal teams and customers along with innovating effective solutions to meet issues & problems as they arise
* Conducting site assessments at various facilities to proactively prepare for the onsite installation of AWS equipment
* Installing/expanding/provisioning AWS infrastructure at the third-party premises, data center, and/or non-traditional environment
* Troubleshooting hardware, network installations & configurations and performing network testing, break/fix, rack installations and/or decommissioning and solving complex problems
* Proactively identifying and implementing strategies that prevent support issues and/or further enhance the customer experience
* Process and track purchase orders for data center hardware components
* Monitor spare parts inventory levels and initiate replenishment orders
* Maintain accurate records in internal ordering databases
* Execute asset transfers across global locations
* Track order approvals and provide timely updates to stakeholders
* Identify and report shipment issues, including delays, cancellations, and expedited requests
* Manage shipment label distribution for new equipment and returns
* Coordinate with global teams to ensure timely delivery and resolution of issue
* Conduct day-to-day business, both internally and with external customers
* Required travel up to 25% on average. You will be required to travel between locations to install, service, and retrieve AWS equipment.
* Physical ability to push and/or pull heavy objects into position (regularly lift up to 18kg and participate in team lifts of 30 kg)
* May lead or participate in efforts to develop standard operating procedures (SOPs) and tools that improve operational efficiencies
* May lead larger projects that require cross-functional alignment and support, including large-DC installations, global-reaching business initiatives, and/or development of mechanisms to support growth to ensure compliance with global group standards.
* May be required to work at height to maintain AWS infrastructure equipment while adhering to AWS health & safety guidelines.
* Most of all, you will have a passion for technology along with a desire to be the best at your job every day!


**About The Team**
 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 4+ years of data center engineering or operations experience
* Knowledge of fundamentals of hardware, networking, security, databases (relational or NoSQL), operating systems (Unix, Linux, and/or Windows)
* 2+ years of leading large complex programs experience
* A valid (EU) driving license is required as Data Centers may not have any public transportation available nearby.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree, or 4+ years of relevant technical position experience
* Experience working in a customer-facing environment
* CompTIA A+, CompTIA Network+, Cisco/CCNA, Linux (Redhat), Hardware (installation), AWS, or other industry relevant certifications
* Knowledge of power, cooling, cabling, networking hardware, inventory management, and automation
* Proficiency in network operating systems (Cisco IOS, NX-OS, Junos)


 Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.
   

  

 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 - Amazon Data Services Sweden AB - C95
   

  

 Job ID: A3146351

title: Head, Dmart Commercial
description:
foodora is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index.
   

  

**Job Description**
 foodora market continues to grow, develop and expand at an extremely fast pace! We are breaking new ground for the entire grocery trade through our darkstores business. In our darkstores we store thousands of products to ensure that our customers can do their weekly shopping and get it delivered to their door in less than 30mins after placing their order. Cool huh? foodora market is a game changer and we hope you want to join our exciting journey!
   

  

**What You Will (but Not Only) Do**
* The scope of the role is broad and covers everything from highly strategic decisions to very hands-on tasks such as assortment workshops, negotiating with suppliers and wholesalers to doing the monthly performance materials.
* You are responsible for foodora markets customer offering which means: what meets the customer when opening the app.
* In more details. you (and your team) are responsible for conversion, site performance overall, assortment, price, campaigns, average basket value, items per order, price levels balanced with profitability measures, promotions such as samplings and all other non-margin revenues, and our external collaborations.
* P&L responsibility for Commercial revenues & costs.
* Leading our category management and pricing strategies
* Plan, host and develop our annual talk-of-the-town “Supplier Day”
* You have an essential role in our Management team, contributing to the overall strategic direction, day-to-day decisions and ensuring the commercial aspect in all decisions made
* Coach, lead, set and track developments for the Commercial team.
* Collaborate with internal stakeholders from other functions such as the operations -, logistics -, marketing -, product and finance team and take actions to drive the business forward
* Collaborate with Delivery Hero’s regional and central teams as well as sister companies across Europe. Answering up to the regional team on how we perform on the local KPI scorecards, and set & follow up on action plans to reach the targets


**Qualifications**
* You know the grocery retail business inside and out either from the supplier or retailer side, preferably also from an e-com and/or q-com perspective.
* You are used to leading in an environment where you need to balance the needs and expectations of multiple departments and stakeholders.
* You have a university degree within business or economics or a long experience of work that have given you similar experience
* You have 7+ years experience in a managing role with budget ownership & team leadership
* Familiarity with category management and strategies
* You have experience from collaboration and stakeholder management in an international context
* You have professional knowledge of excel/google sheets and powerpoint and are confident on stage.
* You communicate fluently in Swedish and English both verbally and in writing


**Additional Information**
* Wellness allowance topped with the opportunity to participate in many work/life balance initiatives at foodora such as free group training at Sats & reduced price on massage.
* Employee discount at foodora (woho!) and awesome Friday breakfasts!
* Occupational pension, incl. premium exemption insurance, accident insurance and life insurance.
* foodora Learning - Monthly learning sessions about different topics, such as the q-commerce industry, negotiation techniques and project management combined with a structured onboarding and inspiring courses within our learning tool Sana
* Great deals at Benify (for e.g. gym membership, e-bikes hotels, audiobooks, streaming services, clothes, kitchen supplies… and so much more!
* Awesome AW’s and (pink) parties!

title: Financial Accounting Consultant (SAP)
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. At Packaged Based Solutions (PBS) Nordics, a Capgemini unit specializing in ERP transformation, you will be part of a strong Nordic team delivering lasting value to our clients. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Your role**
 As an experienced SAP S/4HANA Finance Consultant, you will optimize end‑to‑end financial accounting processes and deliver value in complex SAP programs for global clients.
   

  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*
* Lead the design, configuration, and implementation of SAP S/4HANA Finance solutions aligned with business needs.
* Advising clients on key Finance areas such as General Ledger, AP/AR, Asset Accounting, Controlling, and Treasury.
* Work closely with cross‑functional teams to ensure seamless integration with other SAP modules (e.g., SD, MM, PP, WM, PM).
* Mentor and support junior consultants in their professional development and ensuring high-quality project delivery.
* Stay up to date with SAP S/4HANA Finance developments and industry trends.


**Your profile**
* 5+ years of hands‑on experience implementing SAP Finance solutions in complex environments.
* Strong understanding of end‑to‑end finance processes and how to translate them into effective SAP solutions.
* Experience leading a finance workstream in a global S/4HANA implementation and strong analytical skills and attention to detail.
* Confidence in facilitating workshops and aligning IT with business stakeholders.


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* Freedom to shape your work, manage your time with hybrid flexibility, and have the space to be creative, innovate, and make a real difference.
* A variety of social and wellness activities, from sports and health programs to cultural events and art initiatives, designed to bring employees together and enrich work life.
* An inspiring environment where you can accelerate your growth through continuous learning, professional certifications, and world-class programs from Udemy, Harvard Manager Mentor, and our trusted partner learnings.
* Collaborate with a nordic and global network of experts, gain cutting-edge insights, and stay ahead in the latest technologies and business practices.
* An extensive benefits package, including parental benefits, occupational and flex pension, private insurance, preventive healthcare, and more.


**Application**
*We are looking for candidates based in the Nordic region who are fluent in English. Proficiency in at least one Nordic language is required for this role. It can also include some travel, so being open to that is important. We review applications continuously and make hiring decisions on an ongoing basis - so if this role sounds like a great fit, we encourage you to apply soon!
   

  

 In this recruitment process, we review applications and hire on an ongoing basis. As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*
**About Capgemini**
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of over 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2025 global revenues of €22.5 billion.
   

  

**Make it real** 
 | www.capgemini.com

title: Senior IT Consultant - Stockholm | BCG Platinion
description:
Who We Are
   

  

 Do you want to turn the challenges of digitalization into the solutions of the future? Join BCG Platinion in tackling the core IT issues of leading global companies. Deploy customized platforms, architectures, strategies, and organizations to leverage the digital potential of our customers and drive true innovation, with state-of-the-art tools such as cloud computing, AI, blockchain, microservices, and containerization. Add your individual strengths to our unique team, always there to support you. Together with Boston Consulting Group and our clients, we turn digital visions into reality.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

 For our Stockholm office, we are looking for Senior IT Consultants to collaborate with colleagues from BCG Platinion and/or The Boston Consulting Group on national and international client projects! You will be independently structuring project modules and supporting junior project members. Together with our clients, you will develop superior IT strategies, concepts, and solutions actively and on site, applying your sound technical know-how, your understanding of business contexts, and your analytical and conceptual skills.
   

  

 What You'll Bring
   

  

**You can help us make a difference if you**
* completed a university degree in computer science, informatics, engineering, business or a related field with higher-than-average grades
* bring a minimum of four years relevant experience in IT consulting, in the course of which you ran transformation and implementation projects in terms of both strategy and operations
* have led project teams of more than three people
* know exactly what the buzzwords machine learning, cyber resilience, DevOps, agile, AI, and robotics mean
* are familiar with all the stages of development for successful IT organizations and IT processes.
* know exactly how to put together complex business cases
* feel particularly comfortable in interdisciplinary teams and global contexts and are flexible and willing to travel
* are on a fluent level of understanding and communicating complex topics in English


 Who You'll Work With
   

  

**Shape the world of tomorrow**
* Form the digital transformation of globally leading companies while maintaining a clear view of overall technical solutions and client circumstances
* Drive groundbreaking projects forward by using agile methods and modern approaches within the scope of strategic IT implementation for clients and by actively steering the relevant modules
* Smooth the path for tailored, future-oriented customer journeys based on precise analysis of the situation and with current market developments and trends such as machine learning in mind
* Design and optimize unique IT architectures within the framework of enterprise solution requirements, modern custom software developments, and sustainable digital solutions, including cyber resilience


 Additional info
   

  

**How To Grow With Us**
 We guarantee constant development incentives in an open and rewarding work environment! Together with a dedicated team of talented colleagues, you get to work on new challenges every day. Individual training offers and a culture of open feedback will provide the framework needed to explore and perfect personal strengths. Our modern structures allow focusing on the essence of our work - with easy travel booking, an excellent back-office support and comprehensive Knowledge Center. With our regular office Fridays and legendary events, we nurture a strong and close team network beyond our case work.
   

  

*BCG Platinion is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under national, provincial, or local law, where applicable.*
*#BCGPlatinion*
 Boston Consulting Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under national, provincial, or local law, where applicable, and those with criminal histories will be considered in a manner consistent with applicable state and local laws.

title: Director, IT Strategy Consulting, SAP
description:
**About The Role**
 Gartner Consulting is experiencing accelerating demand for independent, strategic advice in the SAP domain. We are seeking seasoned SAP professionals to join our Nordic & European team, delivering end-to-end SAP strategy and transformation services that drive measurable client value and impact. You will work across both public sector and commercial industries, partnering with leading organizations to guide their SAP transformation journeys—especially the transition to S/4HANA.
   

  

**Why Join Gartner Consulting?**
* Influence the SAP transformation journeys of leading organizations across the Nordic and EMEA regions.
* Work alongside a team of recognized experts in a collaborative, growth-focused environment.
* Access to Gartner’s industry-leading research, methodologies, and professional development resources.
* Competitive compensation and benefits package.


 As a member of our expert team, you will play a pivotal role in shaping and executing SAP-enabled business transformations, moving beyond strategy development to deliver tangible value realization. You will contribute to the ongoing development and maturity of Gartner’s Enterprise Applications consulting practice, leveraging Gartner’s research and best practices to enhance client outcomes.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Advise C-suite and senior stakeholders on SAP strategy, transformation roadmaps, and S/4HANA migration, aligning technology initiatives with business objectives.
* Drive and guide SAP transformation engagements, from initial strategic assessment and business case development through implementation, change management, and value realization.
* Develop and refine methodologies, tools, and approaches to accelerate client impact and ensure delivery excellence.
* Identify and pursue opportunities to expand client relationships and grow the SAP consulting practice across the Nordic and EMEA regions.
* Deliver quality assurance on key project deliverables, ensuring alignment with Gartner’s high standards and client expectations.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive innovation, share thought leadership, and contribute to go-to-market strategies.


**Ideal Candidate Profile**
* Extensive experience in client-facing consulting roles, with a proven track record of leading SAP transformation programs for large, complex organizations.
* Deep understanding of SAP S/4HANA and core SAP modules (Finance, HR, Supply Chain), including target state definition, business case development, and migration planning.
* Demonstrated ability to baseline existing SAP/ERP environments and architect transition strategies to S/4HANA-enabled future states.
* Exceptional executive communication and stakeholder management skills, with experience presenting to CxO-level audiences.
* Strategic thinker with the ability to develop and deliver compelling analysis and presentations that drive client decision-making.
* Experience in developing and maturing SAP service offerings, including methodologies, deliverables, and go-to-market plans.
* Strong business development acumen, with a history of identifying and realizing SAP/ERP expansion opportunities.
* Commitment to continuous learning and staying abreast of SAP trends, best practices, and industry developments.
* Required: Eligible for Finnish security clearance.
* Required: Fluent in Swedish


**Who you are:**
* Comfortable selling to, influencing and building trust-based, value-added relationships with senior executives
* Coachable and embracing of best practices and feedback as a means of continuous improvement
* A consistently high achiever marked by perseverance, humility and a positive outlook in the face of challenges
* Proven track record in achieving / exceeding revenue targets
* Ability to travel to client sites as necessary


**Why Join Us?**
 This is a unique opportunity to join a world-class consulting team with a proven track record. You’ll work alongside experts who are committed to delivering meaningful change.
   

  

**Our Team Culture**
 We believe that great work starts with great people. You’ll be part of a team that is anchored in shared values, deep technology expertise, and a strong sense of purpose. We foster a culture of trust, collaboration, and continuous learning—where every voice is valued and every contribution matters.
   

  

 We believe in flexibility, and our hybrid work environment enables this, combined with in-person collaboration with clients and teams to work and grow together. What unites us is not where we work, but how we work: with integrity, curiosity, and a commitment to making a difference.
   

  

**Who are we?**
 At Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT), we guide the leaders who shape the world.
   

  

 Our mission relies on expert analysis and bold ideas to deliver actionable, objective business and technology insights, helping enterprise leaders and their teams succeed with their mission-critical priorities.
   

  

 Since our founding in 1979, we’ve grown to 21,000 associates globally who support ~14,000 client enterprises in ~90 countries and territories. We do important, interesting and substantive work that matters. That’s why we hire associates with the intellectual curiosity, energy and drive to want to make a difference. The bar is unapologetically high. So is the impact you can have here.
   

  

**What makes Gartner a great place to work?**
 Our vast, virtually untapped market potential offers limitless opportunities – opportunities that may not even exist right now – for you to grow professionally and flourish personally. How far you go is driven by your passion and performance.
   

  

 We hire remarkable people who collaborate and win as a team. Together, our singular, unifying goal is to deliver results for our clients.
   

  

 Our teams are inclusive and composed of individuals from different geographies, cultures, religions, ethnicities, races, genders, sexual orientations, abilities and generations.
   

  

 We invest in great leaders who bring out the best in you and the company, enabling us to multiply our impact and results. This is why, year after year, we are recognized worldwide as a great place to work.
   

  

**What do we offer?**
 Gartner offers world-class benefits, highly competitive compensation and disproportionate rewards for top performers.
   

  

 In our hybrid work environment, we provide the flexibility and support for you to thrive — working virtually when it's productive to do so and getting together with colleagues in a vibrant community that is purposeful, engaging and inspiring.
   

  

 Ready to grow your career with Gartner? Join us.
   

  

 The policy of Gartner is to provide equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status, citizenship status, age, national origin, ancestry, disability, veteran status, or any other legally protected status and to seek to advance the principles of equal employment opportunity.
   

  

 Gartner is committed to being an Equal Opportunity Employer and offers opportunities to all job seekers, including job seekers with disabilities. If you are a qualified individual with a disability or a disabled veteran, you may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Company’s career webpage as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by calling Human Resources at +1 (203) 964-0096 or by sending an email to ApplicantAccommodations@gartner.com.

 Gartner Applicant Privacy Link: https://jobs.gartner.com/applicant-privacy-policy
