* Position requires an individual with a minimum of 10-15 years of tax experience (with a focus of South Asia tax – Singapore, Korea, Japan)
* Big 4 accounting/tax firm experience preferably


**Key Competencies Required**
* Strong written and verbal communication skills
* Self-management & integrity. Works well alone as well as in a team
* Time management skills and ability to meet deadlines and multi-task
* Strives for continuous improvement
* Ability to understand complex legal structures, regulations and apply judgement
* Very well organised and high attention to detail


 Brookfield is committed to maintaining a Positive Work Environment that is safe and respectful; our shared success depends on it. Accordingly, we do not tolerate workplace discrimination, violence or harassment.
   

  

 We are proud to create a diverse environment and are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We are grateful for your interest in this position, however, only candidates selected for pre-screening will be contacted.

title: Senior Test Manager
description:
**Om rollen**
-------------


Vi söker en erfaren Senior Test Manager för ett konsultuppdrag med start i maj 2026. I rollen får du en nyckelposition där du leder, utvecklar och skapar gemensamma arbetssätt och strategier för test – både på strategisk och operativ nivå. Du blir den samlande kraften för testarbetet inom en stor och komplex organisation och driver riktningen för hur testning bedrivs över flera team och leveranser. Uppdraget löper till december 2026 med möjlighet till förlängning.

**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------

* Definiera och förvalta testprocesser, riktlinjer och gemensamma arbetssätt för riskhantering och kvalitetssäkring
* Leda och vidareutveckla testområdet genom att driva forum för kompetensutveckling och erfarenhetsutbyte
* Verka som rådgivare och metodstöd till teamen – särskilt i komplexa situationer, vid riskhantering och vid beroenden mellan team
* Säkerställa helhet och riktning i testarbetet inom digitala leveranser
* Datadrivet analysera incidenter och buggar för att identifiera förbättringsområden och förebyggande åtgärder
* Lyfta utmaningar till rätt nivå i organisationen och bidra till ökad effektivitet och kvalitet

**Krav**
--------

* Flera års erfarenhet av testledning eller rollen som Test Manager
* Mycket god kunskap inom Rapid Software Testing, genom utbildning eller dokumenterad praktisk tillämpning
* Erfarenhet av agila team och agila organisationer
* Erfarenhet av att etablera eller utveckla testprocesser och gemensamma arbetssätt
* Förmåga att coacha, leda och skapa struktur över flera team

**Meriterande**
---------------

* Erfarenhet av testautomation
* Erfarenhet av Azure DevOps
* Erfarenhet av SAFe
* Erfarenhet från komplexa organisationer med många leveransteam

**Start**
---------


2026-05

**Längd**
---------


Till och med 2026-12 (möjlighet till förlängning)

**Plats**
---------


Hässleholm/Malmö (hybrid, 3 dagar/vecka på plats)

**Om Rasulson Consulting**
--------------------------


Rasulson Consulting är ett specialiserat bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag inom IT-sektorn. Vi samarbetar med både etablerade teknikbolag och innovativa startupföretag för att erbjuda attraktiva karriärmöjligheter för dig som vill utvecklas inom digitalisering och IT. Genom vår djupa tekniska kompetens och vårt omfattande nätverk matchar vi rätt konsult med rätt uppdrag – snabbt och träffsäkert. Hos oss får du personlig rådgivning, kontinuerlig återkoppling och möjlighet att ta nästa steg i din karriär.

title: Solutions Architect, Telco Vendors & Nordics
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS) is responsible for driving revenue, adoption, and growth from the largest and fastest growing small- and mid-market accounts to enterprise-level customers including public sector.
  

  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is seeking a technical leader to help Nordics Customers and Independent Software Vendors (ISVs), and Network Equipment Providers (NEPs), and Communications service providers (CSP) transform their businesses with AWS technology.  

  

Solutions Architects are at the crossroads of business and technology and engage with organizations at all stages of cloud adoption. Solutions Architects also take a leading role in creating and presenting technical content and best practices.  

  

The problem domains are diverse: Enterprise IT Modernization, Data and GenAI, Cybersecurity, 5G monetization, digital customer journeys, OSS/BSS transformation, cybersecurity. At your disposal is the breadth of AWS.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

As part of the team, you will collaborate with customers, internal AWS teams, and AWS partners to deliver solutions to the unique challenges of information and operational technology in telecom customers.
  

You will be the single-threaded owner of the AWS technology strategy for your customer and account team to drive AWS adoption. The ability to connect technology with measurable business value while assessing risks, balancing trade-offs, and encouraging risk-tasking to maximize your customer's business value of AWS is critical to a solutions architect. You should also have a demonstrated ability to think long-term about business, product, and technical outcomes.  

  

Role requires domestic and international (mainly Europe) travel up to 30%.
  

  

A day in the life  

Understand customer business objectives and design solutions that are cost-effective, secure, and sustainable to deliver.
  

Work closely with other functions (Account Managers, Partners, Support) to delight our customers.  

Build and publish external facing content.  

  

About the team  

Our team is small and motivated. We come from diverse backgrounds, but what we all have in common is a huge curiosity, a passion for delighting our customers, and a desire to deliver technology that transforms their business. What’s it like to work at AWS?
  

  

Our team experiences high levels of collaboration, lots of multi-tasking, and often course corrections or new ideas that mean adaptability is key. We find creative and scalable solutions to our customers’ difficult problems, and we own delivering those outcomes to the customer. We are also a geographically-distributed team, which means you will need to possess a high bias for taking action without immediate team consensus.  

  

Diverse Experiences  

Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.  

  

Why AWS  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Work/Life Balance  

We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why flexible work hours and arrangements are part of our culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.  

  

Inclusive Team Culture  

Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.  

  

Mentorship and Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Background in any of the following: Cloud Architecture, Systems Design, Software Development, Infrastructure Architecture, Data Engineering or DevOps.
* Experience and literacy in GenAI.
* Technical Degree (Computer Science, Maths, Engineering or equivalent) and/or relevant tech experience.
* Fluent written and verbal communication skills in English.
* A passion for technology and for learning.


- - Background in any of the following: Cloud Architecture, Systems Design, Software Development, Infrastructure Architecture, Data Engineering or DevOps.  

- - Experience and literacy in GenAI.  

- - Technical Degree (Computer Science, Maths, Engineering or equivalent) and/or relevant tech experience.  

- - Fluent written and verbal communication skills in English.  

- - A passion for technology and for learning.**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------


- Experience designing, building, refactoring or operating large scale IT systems - either on premises or in the cloud.  

* Working knowledge of cloud native architectures.
* Knowledge of a modern programming language (Python, JavaScript, Go, .Net, Java, etc.) and/or scripting, Infrastructure as Code etc.
* Experience working in a customer-facing role or a role which involved public speaking.
* AWS certification (e.g. AWS Solutions Architect Associate or Professional) or other industry certification.
* Knowledge of regulations, security requirements, and compliance standards applicable to EU or Sweden.
* Telecom knowledge (BSS, OSS, Core, RAN, Transport, NetworkAPIs)
* Fluent written and verbal communication skills in Swedish/Finnish.

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
company_description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) offers the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform, with over 200 powerful services that enable our customers and our people to make more of an impact.

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
**Att jobba som Azure DevOps specialist**
 Som Azure DevOps Specialist kommer du att ha en viktig roll i att möjliggöra effektiva, säkra och skalbara leveransflöden inom våra utvecklingsplattformar. Tillsammans med teamet är du med och utvecklar Skandias bygg- och leveransförmåga genom hela DevSecOps-kedjan – från kod till test som drift. Din vardag innebär nära samarbete med våra utvecklingsteam, arkitekter och interna driftorganisation där du bidrar till vår fortsatta automationsresa genom att kvalitetssäkra och optimera våra tekniska flöden.
   

  

 I din vardag kommer du bland annat att skapa ramverk för pipelines med hjälp av Managed DevOps Pools i Azure där du även ansvarar för att skriva YAML-konfigurationer. Du kommer att arbeta med feeds och pakethantering samt utvärdera nya verktyg och funktioner för att stärka våra tekniska flöden. En viktig del av din roll är att säkerställa att våra plattformar är förvaltade och livscykelhanterade samtidigt som du även arbetar med säkerhet som testautomatisering i leveransprocessen.
   

  

 Teamet du kommer till har ett tydligt fokus på automation, DevSecOps och Release on demand. Vi tror på frihet under ansvar, kontinuerlig förbättring och värdet av att dela kunskap. Vårt arbetssätt bygger på tillit, transparens och gemensamt lärande.
   

  

 Vi arbetar hybrid vilket innebär arbete på kontoret varvat med distansarbete. I rollen kommer du att rapportera till gruppchef IT Test- & Utvecklingsstöd.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen**
 Vi ser att du har flerårig erfarenhet som Azure DevOps Specialist eller liknande tekniska roller. Du har en god förståelse för Azure DevOps som plattform och är van vid att arbeta med YAML, Git, PowerShell och C#. För att lyckas har du erfarenhet av att bygga och underhålla CI/CT/CD-pipelines samt att arbeta med pakethantering, feeds och automatiserade flöden.
   

  

 Det är viktigt att du har jobbat enligt agila metoder, gärna inom ramverket SAFe där samarbete, struktur och förändring går hand i hand. Du har dessutom ett genuint intresse för DevSecOps och en vilja att både förenkla och förbättra inte bara koden, utan även processer och arbetssätt. Ett grundkrav är att du kan svenska flytande både i tal och skrift.
   

  

 Meriterande för rollen är om du har erfarenhet av molntjänster i Azure, hantering av containerplattformar och testautomatisering.
   

  

 Som person ser vi att du är teamorienterad, kommunikativ och engagerad. Du delar gärna med dig av din kunskap, är nyfiken på ny teknik och har ett lösningsfokuserat sätt att ta dig an arbetsuppgifter. Du är ödmjuk i din expertis och trygg i att ta en rådgivande roll gentemot andra team.
   

  

**Vad händer nu?**
 Vi jobbar med löpande urval så tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan redan idag. I ansökan kommer vi att ställa ett antal urvalsfrågor som ligger till grund för urvalet.
   

  

 Läs mer om hela vår rekryteringsprocess här.
   

  

 Vi kommer att återkoppla till alla som söker oavsett om du går vidare eller inte.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kring rollen vänligen ta kontakt med rekryterande chef Izabella Rolnik på izabella.rolnik@skandia.se.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kopplat till rekryteringsprocessen ta kontakt med Talent Acquisition Partner Harald Brehmer på harald.brehmer@skandia.se.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**Mer om IT**
 Vi på Skandia IT är stolta över att vara en kundorienterad enhet som levererar effektiva och säkra lösningar för våra kunder. Med cirka 600 engagerade medarbetare är vi mitt i en spännande transformationsresa, där vi utvecklas tillsammans och har kul på vägen. Framåt tillsammans är vårt motto!
   

  

 Vi arbetar agilt och har sedan 2017 använt oss av SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) ramverket, där leverans och kundvärde alltid står i centrum. Våra tågledningar och team, jobbar verksamhetsbaserat med aktiviteter som sprintplanering, daily stand-ups, team-synk, code reviews och retrospektiv.
   

  

 Var 12:e vecka samlas vi alla i vår ljusa och inspirerande Ljusgård på kontoret i Stockholm för 2 planeringsdagar. Planeringsperioden består av 6 tvåveckorssprintar, där den sista sprinten är en innovationssprint. Här får du chansen att, själv eller tillsammans med ditt team, utveckla och förfina våra system.

title: Software Engineer in Process Automation Platforms team
description:
Are you passionate about shaping the future of automation, AI and scalable modern infrastructure?
   

  

 In Swedbank you have the opportunity to:
   

  

* Design, configure, and maintain Power Platform environments, connectors, and integrations with internal systems, while expanding your skills in enterprise automation architecture.
* Set up and manage Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policies and secure network connections such as on-premises data gateways, gaining practical experience in securing automation environments.
* Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines to automate solution deployment and testing processes, developing your expertise in DevOps and continuous delivery practices.
* Collaborate with security and compliance teams to ensure infrastructure aligns with regulatory and organizational requirements, deepening your understanding of governance in digital ecosystems.
* Support the deployment and configuration of Azure resources, including Cognitive Services, Storage Accounts, and Virtual Networks, while strengthening your knowledge of scalable cloud infrastructure.
* Act as a subject matter expert on infrastructure for Power Platform and Azure integrations, while mentoring others and helping shape automation standards across the organization.


 What is needed in this role:
   

  

* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related field
* Strong problem-solving skills to navigate complex technical challenges.
* Excellent communication abilities, with the capacity to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders clearly and effectively.
* Proven experience in software or infrastructure engineering, particularly with Microsoft technologies.
* Hands-on experience with Power Platform including integration with external data sources and services.
* Deep understanding of Azure services, including Cognitive Services, Networking (VNets, NSGs), and Storage solutions.
* Practical experience with CI/CD tools such as Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions to support automated deployments.
* Knowledge of Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policies, identity and access management, and compliance frameworks.
* Microsoft certifications in Power Platform or Azure are a strong plus


 " Join our team and...
   

  

 become part of a group of talented individuals working in a truly collaborative and supportive atmosphere. As your manager, I’m caring, engaged, and committed to your growth. I value structure and clarity, but I’m also flexible when it counts. My goal is to build a high-performing team where everyone feels safe to be themselves, share ideas, and shape how we work together. We celebrate success, learn from challenges, and have fun along the way. I believe in empowering people to do great things - if that sounds like your kind of environment, we’d love to have you with us.”
 **Vladislavas Turčukas,** 
**your future manager.**
 We look forward to your application at 12.04.2026 the latest.
   

  

*If you are to be employed in Lithuania, please note that the salary offered for this position ranges from 3,900–5,800 € gross i.e. before taxes.* 
*Read more here* 
*.*
**Location: Stockholm, Sundbyberg, Vilnius.**
**Swedbank does not discriminate anybody based on gender, age, sexual orientation or sexual identity, ethnicity, religion or disability – everybody is welcome.**

title: Senior AWS & Python Backend Developer
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

**Your Role**
 We are looking for a highly skilled and motivated 5+ yrs experienced Senior Developer with strong experience in Python and cloud-native development to join our Stockholm team.
   

  

 In this role, you will work extensively with AWS Serverless technologies, building scalable, reliable and high-performing backend systems that support business-critical applications.
   

  

 The assignment involves designing, developing and maintaining modern cloud-based backend services, with a strong focus on performance, reliability and scalability. The systems are built using serverless architectures and event-driven patterns, enabling efficient and flexible solutions in a cloud-native environment.
   

  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*
* Developing and maintaining backend services using AWS Serverless architecture
* Implementing scalable and reliable solutions using Python
* Designing and building services that support data-driven and event-based architectures. Good to have Experience in building microservices in cloud environments
* Working with AWS storage and database services to support application functionality
* Troubleshooting, optimizing and enhancing backend systems to ensure high availability and performance
* Contributing to CI/CD automation and improving deployment workflows


**Your Profile**
* Strong experience in Python backend development
* Experience building scalable backend systems in cloud environments
* Hands-on experience working with AWS databases and storage solutions and relational databases (PostgreSQL or SQL)
* Experience using Git for version control. Experience with CI/CD pipelines, preferably GitLab CI/CD
* Experience with Infrastructure-as-Code tools such as Terraform or AWS CDK
* Solid experience with AWS Serverless technologies, including:


 AWS Lambda, AWS Step Functions, CloudWatch, API Gateway, S3, DynamoDB, Event Bridge, SNS / SQS
   

  

**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* We recognize the significance of flexible work arrangements to provide support. Be it remote work, or flexible work hours, you will get an environment to maintain healthy work life balance.
* At the heart of our mission is your career growth. Our array of career growth programs and diverse professions are crafted to support you in exploring a world of opportunities.
* We support your personal development and offer an education library with more than 250 000 (!) courses and educations and certifications.


**Application**
 As part of our recruitment process, identity verification or background checks may occasionally be conducted.
   

  

 Valid work permit for Sweden is required.
   

  

 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Data Engineer
description:
*At* 
***Norrin***
*, we’re shaping the era of Enterprise Intelligence. Our vision is to transform business productivity through data & AI by creating solutions that deliver measurable impact. As a Microsoft technology partner, we are at the forefront of reshaping how businesses operate across the Nordics. What defines us is deep technical expertise, a creative engineering mindset, and a people-first culture. You’ll have the chance to grow in a direction that matters to you while building solutions that make a real difference. With a strong presence in Finland and growing operations in Sweden, the United States, Thailand and Vietnam, we continue to expand our Nordic roots internationally. Most recently, Swedish company* 
***BizOne***
*joined the Norrin Group, further strengthening our presence across the Nordics.*
 We’re looking for
 **Data Engineers** 
 to join our growing team in Stockholm. You might be a data enthusiast with a couple of years under your belt or already a more seasoned professional. What matters most to us is your willingness to keep learning, take ownership, and work on solutions that create clear business value.
   

  

 In this role, you will get to work on a variety of cloud-based customer projects, designing and building modern data platforms and analytics solutions using Azure Data Platform services, Databricks, and AI-enabled tools. Your work may include data modelling, integrations, and architectural design, always in close collaboration with customers and internal experts. You will also be part of Norrin’s Data Engineering Guild, a community where knowledge is shared, skills are developed together, and people actively support each other’s growth.
   

  

**🌱Why Norrin?**
* People-first culture: A workplace where you can be yourself. Our culture is built on openness, equality, and mutual respect
* Flexible working model: Our hybrid model offers the best of both worlds, flexibility in your daily life and in-person collaboration when it moves things forward
* Fair compensation: A competitive salary that reflects your skills and experience
* Grow with us: We encourage continuous learning and development in a direction that matters to you


**✨ We value**
* 2-5 years of experience as a Data Engineer or in analytics solution development
* Experience building Databricks and/or Fabric-based solutions in an Azure environment
* Understanding of data warehousing, data modelling, and integrations
* Good collaboration skills and a customer-oriented mindset
* Curiosity and initiative to keep learning new things and stay up to date
* Ability to communicate technical solutions clearly, also to non-technical stakeholders
* Fluent Swedish and English skills


**🛠️ Your technical toolkit**
* Strong skills in SQL and Python/PySpark
* Experience building data pipelines using Databricks, dbt, Microsoft Fabric or similar
* Solid understanding of data security and privacy principles
* Experience with dimensional modelling
* Knowledge of DevOps and CI/CD principles


**Experience With**
 ➕
 **What’s a plus (but not required)**
* Power BI and automated reporting
* GenAI or machine learning, including MLOps
* Cloud data warehouses such as Snowflake.


**📩 Could this be your next step?**
 We’re excited to hear from you. Please submit your application as soon as possible. We will move forward with the recruitment process as soon as we find the right candidate.

title: Manager - Stockholm | BCG Platinion
description:
Who We Are
   

  

 Do you want to turn the challenges of digitalization into the solutions of the future? Join BCG Platinion in tackling the core IT issues of leading global companies. Deploy customized platforms, architectures, strategies, and organizations to leverage the digital potential of our customers and drive true innovation, with state-of-the-art tools such as cloud computing, AI, blockchain, microservices, and containerization. Add your individual strengths to our unique team, always there to support you. Together with Boston Consulting Group and our clients, we turn digital visions into reality.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

 As a Manager at BCG Platinion in the Nordics, you are responsible for the execution and management of our national and international client projects. We collaborate with colleagues from BCG Platinion and/or the Boston Consulting Group on site and directly with the client company. The Manager role incorporates structuring the project and performing the required resource planning. Besides the functional navigation of the project members, you will also be involved operationally in the project business. Together with our clients, you will develop convincing IT strategies, concepts and solutions, applying technical know-how and extensive experience in structuring IT projects, just as analytical and conceptual skills. We independently support our clients, present our results to their decision makers, and agree on the next steps.
   

  

 What You'll Bring
   

  

**You can help us make a difference if you**
* bring a completed a degree in computer science, (business) informatics, or a related area with above-average grades
* have at least eight years of substantial experience in IT consulting and the lead design and management of IT strategy and implementation projects
* already captured project-related management experience as the lead of teams with more than five people
* know how to plan IT initiatives and build solid business cases
* optimally steer decisions towards the goal and master escalating situations with an eye to solutions - even in complex organizational structures
* have successfully acquired consulting projects
* are excellent at understanding and communicating complex topics in English


 Who You'll Work With
   

  

**Shape the world of tomorrow**
* Independently contribute to build close client relationships - and as their trusted advisor, you are the first to whom they turn
* Acquire new projects and challenges for our company and yourself
* Be in charge of planning, leading, and assuring quality for strategic IT projects - we work with passion for our clients' long-term success
* Get to use your comprehensive knowledge of technology and industry understanding to provide both internal and external stakeholders with the orientation they need in critical project phases and challenging situations
* Think across projects and connecting factors, and plan resources to achieve the best efficiency possible
* Take ownership for presenting key project results at the highest level of client management
* Work with an entrepreneurial approach and passion to advance BCG Platinion with your contributions to people development, recruiting, and practice areas


 Additional info
   

  

**How To Grow With Us**
 We guarantee constant development incentives in an open and rewarding work environment! Together with a dedicated team of talented colleagues, you get to work on new challenges every day. Individual training offers and a culture of open feedback will provide the framework needed to explore and perfect personal strengths. Our modern structures allow focusing on the essence of our work - with easy travel booking, an excellent back-office support and comprehensive Knowledge Center. With our regular office Fridays and legendary events, we nurture a strong and close team network beyond our case work.
   

  

*BCG Platinion is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under national, provincial, or local law, where applicable.*
*#BCGPlatinion*
 Boston Consulting Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under national, provincial, or local law, where applicable, and those with criminal histories will be considered in a manner consistent with applicable state and local laws.
   

  

 BCG is an E - Verify Employer. Click here for more information on E-Verify.

title: Senior Cloud Architect
description:
Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom applications-team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation, med leverans av affärskritiska cloudlösningar i hög kvalitet och hastighet, möjliggjort av Generative AI. Bli en del av oss och hjälp världsledande organisationer att frigöra teknikens värde och bygga en mer hållbar och inkluderande framtid!
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Vi söker en Cloud Architect som vill ta molnlösningar till nästa nivå med Amazon Web Services (AWS) eller Google Cloud Platform (GCP). Hos oss får du arbeta med det senaste inom säkerhet, infrastruktur, DevSecOps, generativ AI och agentisk AI – och vara med och skapa lösningar som påverkar miljoner människor världen över. I rollen blir du en nyckelperson som förvandlar idéer till verklighet. Du kommer att leda strategiska initiativ på nordisk nivå, inspirera kunder och agera som deras trusted advisor, delta i molnkonferenser, bidra i pre-sales och nätverka med våra partners Amazon, Microsoft och Google.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder karriärmöjligheter i världsklass, projekt inom exempelvis självkörande bilar, livräddande robotar, autonoma system och framtidens AI-lösningar. Du blir en del av ett engagerat team som värdesätter innovation och samarbete – med månatliga aktiviteter och en kultur där vi har kul tillsammans. Vi letar efter fler kollegor som vill hänga med på vår AWS-resa till vårt kontor i Stockholm.
   

  

 Vi arbetar med tekniker som AWS Bedrock, Amazon Q, AWS Quick Suite, AWS Lambda, AWS Control Tower och programmeringsspråk som Java, Python, Node, React, Angular, TypeScript, Kafka, Golang, Kotlin, Terraform och Ansible.
   

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*
* Driva strategi och initiativ inom cloud på nordisk nivå.
* Hjälpa våra kunder med molnarkitektur och cloud native lösningar.
* Använda dig utav generativ och agentisk AI.


**Din profil**
* Minst 6 års erfarenhet av molntjänster som AWS eller GCP.
* Kunskap i ett eller flera programmeringsspråk, t.ex. Python, Java, Kotlin, Golang eller Node.
* Erfarenhet som molnarkitekt eller av att leda molntransformationer.
* Intresse för DevSecOps, generativ AI, agentisk AI och cloud-native lösningar.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i AWS services.
* Flytande svenska och engelska kunskaper, i både tal och skrift.


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas**
* Arbeta med de senaste teknologierna och påverka på nordisk nivå. Du samarbetar med andra specialister, kompetensväxlar och bidrar till att bygga AWS-kapabilitet i Norden – samtidigt som du påverkar några av världens största bolag.
* Utvecklas genom utbildningar, certifieringar och interna initiativ- Du får tillgång till utbildningar och certifieringar inom AI och AWS samt möjlighet att engagera dig i Capgeminis fokusområden som Diversity & Inclusion, Sustainability, Wellness Club och Art Club.
* Njut av en engagerande arbetsplats med starkt stöd och förmåner. Vi erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension, bonusprogram, företagshälsovård och sjukvårdsförsäkring – samt en inkluderande kontorskultur med sociala aktiviteter och teambuilding.


**Ansökan**
 Redo att ta din karriär till nästa nivå? Ansök nu och bli en del av Capgemini Sveriges innovativa AWS-team! Ansök redan idag – vi hanterar ansökningarna löpande. Under processen får du chansen att kika in på vårt kontor, prata med vår rekryterande chef och självklart ställa alla dina nyfikna frågor till vår rekryterare. Varmt välkommen in med din ansökan!
   

  

*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.*
 Till denna roll söker vi medarbetare för säkerhetsklassat uppdrag placerad hos kund.
   

  

 Hos våra kunder arbetar vi i leveranser som kan ha bland annat #AWS, #GCP, #Google, Azure, AliCloud, Java, Go/Golang, Python, Kotlin, Node, HTML, TypeScript, JavaScript, CSS, Java, CloudFormation, Terraform, Docker, Kafka, React, Angular, Vue, Bash, Spring, GenAI, GraphQL, Backstage, Kubernetes, LLM, RAG, Copilot, GitHub Actions, SonarQube, BlackDuck, Apache Beam, Kong, Jenkins, Apigee, OpenShift, Ansible, DevSecOps, cloud architecture, cloud assessments, integration, Snowflake, Elastic Search, Grafana, Kibana, Splunk, Databricks, HelmChart, CloudFoundry.
   

  

 #Innovation #creativity #future #careers #AWS
   

  

**Om Capgemini**
 Capgemini är en AI-driven global partner för affärs- och tekniktransformation som levererar konkret verksamhetsnytta. Vi formar framtiden för organisationer och förverkligar den med hjälp av AI, teknik och människor. Med vår starka historia på nästan 60 år är vi en ansvarsfull och mångsidig koncern med över 420 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Genom vår expertis inom strategi, teknik, design, ingenjörstjänster och affärsverksamhet levererar vi heltäckande tjänster och lösningar, baserade på vår djupa branschkunskap och vårt omfattande partnernätverk. Koncernen rapporterade globala intäkter på 22,5 miljarder euro för 2025.
   

  

**Make it real |** 
 www.capgemini.com

title: Sales Manager Sweden, Issuing Solutions
description:
**Job Description**
**Accelerate the Evolution of Payments with Nexi in 2026**
 Imagine a world where every payment feels effortless, secure, and connected. At Nexi Group, we are building the technology and infrastructure that make this possible.
   

  

 As Europe’s leading PayTech, we enable banks, businesses, and consumers to move money seamlessly. Processing billions of transactions every year, we play a critical role in shaping the future of digital payments across Europe.
   

  

 We’re now looking for a
 **highly driven Sales Manager** 
 to
 **expand Nexi’s presence in Sweden** 
 and accelerate new business growth across the Swedish banking market.
   

  

 If you’re motivated by
 **opening new doors, building relationships from scratch, and winning complex deals** 
 , this role offers a unique opportunity to make a real market impact.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 Sweden represen ts a significant growth opportunity for Nexi
   

  

 We are
 **accelerating our commercial focus in Sweden** 
 , creating a significant opportunity to expand our partnerships with banks and financial institutions.
   

  

 This role offers the chance to
 **play a key role in scaling Nexi’s footprint in one of Europe’s most advanced payments markets.**
 You will engage senior decision-makers, identify strategic opportunities, and lead complex sales processes that bring Nexi’s next-generation issuing and risk management solutions to market.
   

  

 This is a true new-business sales role where success will come from your ability to identify opportunities, build trust with clients, and convert relationships into long-term partnerships.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
**Drive New Business**
* Identify and win new customers across the Swedish banking and financial services sector.
* Build a strong pipeline of opportunities with banks and financial institutions.
* Engage senior stakeholders and decision-makers within the payments ecosystem.
* Lead complex sales cycles from prospecting through negotiation to deal closure.


**Expand Nexi’s Market Presence**
* Position Nexi as a trusted partner for banks looking to modernize their payments capabilities.
* Drive adoption of Nexi’s key solutions, including:
* Nexi Ready – enabling banks to launch card programs faster
* Risk Management Solutions – fraud prevention, disputes, and chargeback services
* Develop compelling value propositions tailored to each client.
* Collaborate with product, delivery, and commercial teams to bring solutions to market successfully.


**Develop the Swedish Market**
* Build Nexi’s visibility and presence across the Swedish banking and payments ecosystem.
* Develop deep insight into the market, competitive landscape, and emerging opportunities.
* Provide market feedback and insights that support Nexi’s broader Nordic growth strategy.


**What Makes You a Great Fit**
 We’re looking for a commercially driven sales professional who enjoys developing new markets and building relationships with senior stakeholders.
   

  

**Your Experience**
* Strong track record in B2B sales within fintech, payments, financial services, or technology.
* Proven ability to win new business and develop strategic client relationships.
* Experience selling complex solutions into banks, financial institutions, or the payments ecosystem.
* Strong understanding of the Swedish financial services landscape.
* Fluent in Swedish and English.
* Excellent negotiation, communication, and presentation skills.


**Your Mindset**
 You succeed in this role if you:
   

  

* Are energized by new business development and building markets.
* Enjoy opening doors and developing relationships with senior stakeholders.
* Combine strategic thinking with hands-on sales execution.
* Thrive in a fast-moving, international environment.
* Are curious, proactive, and motivated by delivering measurable growth.


 Even if you don’t meet every requirement, your experience and ambition could make you a great fit.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**QUALIFICATIONS**
**About Us**
 Are you interested in joining one of Europe's leading PayTech companies? Do you want to be part of a diverse team, collaborating with colleagues from across Europe? If so, you're in the right place!
   

  

**About The Team**
 We are the result of merging Nexi, Nets, and Sia, with a presence in over 25 countries. With over 80 years of experience, we offer plenty of opportunities for personal and professional growth
   

  

 At Nexi, we learn, adapt, and think like entrepreneurs. Discover more about our culture by visiting this page: https://www.nexigroup.com/en/people/life-at-nexi/overview/?utm\_source=career-platform&utm\_medium=job-openings&utm\_content=about-the-team

title: Sales Development Representative - Nordics
description:
****About Workato****
 Workato transforms technology complexity into business opportunity. As the leader in enterprise orchestration, Workato helps businesses globally streamline operations by connecting data, processes, applications, and experiences. Its AI-powered platform enables teams to navigate complex workflows in real-time, driving efficiency and agility.
   

  

 Trusted by a community of 400,000 global customers, Workato empowers organizations of every size to unlock new value and lead in today’s fast-changing world. Learn how Workato helps businesses of all sizes achieve more at workato.com.
   

  

**Why join us?**
 Ultimately, Workato believes in fostering a
 **flexible, trust-oriented culture that empowers everyone to take full ownership of their roles** 
 . We are driven by
 **innovation** 
 and looking for
 **team players** 
 who want to actively build our company.
   

  

 But, we also believe in
 **balancing productivity with self-care** 
 . That’s why we offer all of our employees a vibrant and dynamic work environment along with a multitude of benefits they can enjoy inside and outside of their work lives.
   

  

 If this sounds right up your alley, please submit an application. We look forward to getting to know you!
   

  

**Also, Feel Free To Check Out Why:**
* Business Insider named us an “enterprise startup to bet your career on”
* Forbes’ Cloud 100 recognized us as one of the top 100 private cloud companies in the world
* Deloitte Tech Fast 500 ranked us as the 17th fastest growing tech company in the Bay Area, and 96th in North America
* Quartz ranked us the #1 best company for remote workers


****Responsibilities****
 Workato is looking for talented and highly motivated results-oriented individuals to join our expanding sales team. In this role, you will be able to demonstrate a successful track record in remotely managing a large diverse territory. You will be comfortable embracing a start-up environment where personal performance is critical and will have the flexibility and determination to participate in any activity to ensure success.
   

  

 As a
 **Sales Development Representative** 
 , You Will Be Responsible For Uncovering And Developing New Opportunities From Outbound Activities, And Building a Strong Pipeline Of Sales Opportunities To Deliver On Sales Targets. The Prospect Profile Can Vary From IT, Business Operations, To Sales / Marketing / Support Operations. You Will Focus On Sales Opportunity Generation Programs And Their Execution Including Email And Telephone Activities. Excellent Collaboration And Proactive Participation With Our Marketing, Sales And Customer Success Teams Is Critical To Success. As Well As Contributing Through Achievement Of Your Goals, You Will Bring Enthusiasm, Expertise And Creativity To Our Company. You Will Also Be Responsible To:
   

  

* Set up meetings for the Sales Team and help build the company pipeline.
* Work closely with the Marketing Team on campaigns and GTM efforts.
* Work closely with the Sales Team to refine strategy for targeted territories/segments.
* Consult existing customers to understand how they are using Workato currently and where they want to get to as a business
* Achieve agreed upon sales targets and outcomes within schedule
* Reach out to customer leads through cold calling and email
* Continuously improve through feedback


****Requirements****
**Qualifications / Experience / Technical Skills**
* 6 months - 1 year of Sales Development experience preferred. Fresh graduates may apply
* Knowledge of business applications, especially applications used in Sales, Marketing, Customer Support such as Google Apps, Outreach, Zoominfo, Slack and SFDC
* You must speak Finnish or Swedish to be considered for this position


****Soft Skills / Personal Characteristics****
* High energy, positive attitude with the ability to take initiative; strong work ethic, self-directed and resourceful; Discipline to conduct and manage sales cycle process from initial contact through to initial qualification
* Strong customer orientation, dedication, and passion for delivering a great customer experience
* Strong collaboration skills; ability to adapt to a dynamic start-up environment with a passion for making an impact
* You must have any of the Nordic languages as your native language to be considered for this position
* Ability to convey information clearly and analyze customer requirements as needed to help customer make buying decisions
* Some technical aptitude and the ability to become deeply fluent in integration and automation solutions.


**(REQ ID: 2253)**

title: Solutions Architect, Telco Vendors & Nordics
description:
**Description**
 AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS) is responsible for driving revenue, adoption, and growth from the largest and fastest growing small- and mid-market accounts to enterprise-level customers including public sector.
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is seeking a technical leader to help Nordics Customers and Independent Software Vendors (ISVs), and Network Equipment Providers (NEPs), and Communications service providers (CSP) transform their businesses with AWS technology.
   

  

 Solutions Architects are at the crossroads of business and technology and engage with organizations at all stages of cloud adoption. Solutions Architects also take a leading role in creating and presenting technical content and best practices.
   

  

 The problem domains are diverse: Enterprise IT Modernization, Data and GenAI, Cybersecurity, 5G monetization, digital customer journeys, OSS/BSS transformation, cybersecurity. At your disposal is the breadth of AWS.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 As part of the team, you will collaborate with customers, internal AWS teams, and AWS partners to deliver solutions to the unique challenges of information and operational technology in telecom customers.
   

  

 You will be the single-threaded owner of the AWS technology strategy for your customer and account team to drive AWS adoption. The ability to connect technology with measurable business value while assessing risks, balancing trade-offs, and encouraging risk-tasking to maximize your customer's business value of AWS is critical to a solutions architect. You should also have a demonstrated ability to think long-term about business, product, and technical outcomes.
   

  

 Role requires domestic and international (mainly Europe) travel up to 30%.
   

  

 A day in the life
   

  

 Understand customer business objectives and design solutions that are cost-effective, secure, and sustainable to deliver.
   

  

 Work closely with other functions (Account Managers, Partners, Support) to delight our customers.
   

  

 Build and publish external facing content.
   

  

**About The Team**
 Our team is small and motivated. We come from diverse backgrounds, but what we all have in common is a huge curiosity, a passion for delighting our customers, and a desire to deliver technology that transforms their business. What’s it like to work at AWS?
   

  

 Our team experiences high levels of collaboration, lots of multi-tasking, and often course corrections or new ideas that mean adaptability is key. We find creative and scalable solutions to our customers’ difficult problems, and we own delivering those outcomes to the customer. We are also a geographically-distributed team, which means you will need to possess a high bias for taking action without immediate team consensus.
   

  

 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why flexible work hours and arrangements are part of our culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Background in any of the following: Cloud Architecture, Systems Design, Software Development, Infrastructure Architecture, Data Engineering or DevOps.
* Experience and literacy in GenAI.
* Technical Degree (Computer Science, Maths, Engineering or equivalent) and/or relevant tech experience.
* Fluent written and verbal communication skills in English.
* A passion for technology and for learning.
* - Background in any of the following: Cloud Architecture, Systems Design, Software Development, Infrastructure Architecture, Data Engineering or DevOps.
* - Experience and literacy in GenAI.
* - Technical Degree (Computer Science, Maths, Engineering or equivalent) and/or relevant tech experience.
* - Fluent written and verbal communication skills in English.
* - A passion for technology and for learning.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience designing, building, refactoring or operating large scale IT systems - either on premises or in the cloud.
* Working knowledge of cloud native architectures.
* Knowledge of a modern programming language (Python, JavaScript, Go, .Net, Java, etc.) and/or scripting, Infrastructure as Code etc.
* Experience working in a customer-facing role or a role which involved public speaking.
* AWS certification (e.g. AWS Solutions Architect Associate or Professional) or other industry certification.
* Knowledge of regulations, security requirements, and compliance standards applicable to EU or Sweden.
* Telecom knowledge (BSS, OSS, Core, RAN, Transport, NetworkAPIs)
* Fluent written and verbal communication skills in Swedish/Finnish.


 Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.
   

  

 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 - AWS EMEA SARL (Sweden Branch)
   

  

 Job ID: A10383441

title: Product Manager Nova - Debt Collection - Tieto Banktech (m/f/d)
description:
**Job Description**
**Location: Solna, Sweden**
**Department: Credit & Wealth**
 Tieto Banktech powers some of the Nordics’ most trusted banking systems with secure, reliable, and scalable solutions. Using automation, data, AI, and cloud, supported by hands-on guidance, we help banks modernize their core, strengthen trust, and deliver greater impact across the banking experience.
   

  

 We are now seeking an experienced
 **Product Manager** 
 to play a strategic and influential role in shaping the future of
 **Nova – our market‑leading Debt Collection system** 
 . This role offers the opportunity to drive product vision, market positioning, development, and delivery across the Nordics and Europe. Working closely with other Product Managers and cross‑functional teams, you will ensure Nova remains the most efficient, automated, and competitive solution in the Debt Collection industry.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Product Vision & Strategy:**
 Develop and execute a comprehensive product strategy aligned with business goals and market trends, ensuring it is clearly communicated internally and externally.
   

  

**Market Analysis**
 Conduct deep market and competitive analysis to identify opportunities, threats, and trends across capability, pricing, and technology.
   

  

**Product Development**
 Collaborate with engineering and design teams to translate concepts into delivery. Ensure that the product vision and strategy are executed efficiently and effectively.
   

  

**Product Management**
 Ensure full Product Life Cycle Management, including documentation and governance.
   

  

**Product Marketing**
 Drive product positioning, segmentation, and differentiation. Enable sales and customer success with materials, insights, and market messaging. Contribute to customer meetings across sales, innovation, business development, RFP processes, and escalations.
   

  

**Product Roadmap**
 Define and manage the product roadmap, prioritizing enhancements based on customer needs, feedback, and market dynamics.
   

  

**User‑Centric Approach**
 Advocate for intuitive, secure, and user-friendly product experiences that meet high standards of trust and operational excellence.
   

  

**Collaboration**
 Work closely with other Product Managers, Product Owners, and the entire Debt Collection unit.
   

  

**Cross-Functional Collaboration**
 Partner with marketing, sales, engineering, and customer success teams to ensure successful launches and ongoing customer satisfaction.
   

  

**Compliance & Security**
 Ensure all Nova-related products comply with relevant regulatory and security standards.
   

  

**Required Skills & Competencies**
* Proven experience as a Product Manager within fintech, banking, or related industries
* Extensive knowledge of the Debt Collection industry in the Nordics and/or Europe
* Experience from product modernization journeys
* Strategic thinker with a track record of delivering successful products
* Strong collaboration skills in cross-functional environments
* Experience with strategic pricing, financial performance, cost calculations, and budgeting
* Ability to simplify complex information and communicate clearly to varied audiences
* Good pre‑sales capabilities and excellent communication skills in English
* Knowledge of AI in product development or ways of working is an advantage


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field; MBA or equivalent advanced degree is a plus
* Experience working in product organizations with strong tech–business collaboration
* Familiarity with Nordic languages
* Experience contributing to enterprise-level financial products


**We Offer**
 We offer a unique opportunity to shape the future direction of a leading Debt Collection platform, influence product strategy, and contribute to a modern, high-impact product organization. You will work on meaningful initiatives that directly impact our customers’ efficiency, automation capabilities, and competitive edge — all within an open culture, flexible hybrid work model, and a strong focus on continuous learning and collaboration.
   

  

**Interested?**
 We look forward to receiving your application! Interviews will be held continuously, so we encourage you to apply today. For more information or questions, please contact our Talent Acquisition team at
 **recruitmentinbanking@tieto.com** 
 .
   

  

 We perform background checks on all final candidates.
   

  

 Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)

title: Product Marketing Manager
description:
*At Aceve, we empower the builders of society and transform the construction and skilled trades industry—one of the least digitalized sectors in Europe. As a united SaaS powerhouse, we bring together leading products into a single pioneering platform dedicated to making a difference.
   

  

 With over 900 passionate employees and more than €100 million in revenue, we blend tradition and innovation to reshape our industry’s future. Our cloud-based, AI-driven software solutions deliver actionable insights and drive improvements for construction companies and skilled tradespeople, enhancing project management, installations, maintenance, and services.
   

  

 On our ambitious growth journey, we are committed to winning together and accelerating digital transformation. With Aceve’s tools, our customers can boost their performance, productivity, and profitability, ensuring they thrive in a rapidly changing landscape.
   

  

 Join us in revolutionizing the industry and building a brighter future together!*
**About The Role**
 We are looking for a hands-on Product Marketing Manager who turns market reality into clear perspectives and commercially effective messaging that shapes go-to-market decisions and revenue outcomes.
   

  

 The Product Marketing Manager plays a central role in connecting market reality with commercial execution at Aceve. The purpose of this role is to ensure that customer needs, competitive dynamics, and market signals are systematically captured and translated into clear go-to-market actions, strong positioning, and effective sales enablement.
   

  

 This role bridges Product, Sales, and Marketing, helping Aceve make better product, and go-to-market decisions based on structured insights rather than assumptions.
   

  

**What will you do?**
 As Product Marketing Manager, you will own how Aceve listens to the market and turns insight into action. You will drive go-to-market execution for product launches and build our Voice of the Market capability across key verticals.
   

  

 You will work closely with Product Managers, Sales leaders, and Marketing to ensure that launch messaging, positioning, and sales assets are grounded in real customer value and competitive differentiation. A big part of your impact comes from identifying what actually helps sales win, and making sure those insights are clearly communicated and used.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Build and drive Aceve’s Voice of the Market work, collecting, synthesizing, and prioritizing input from customers, sales, usage data, competitors, and market signals.
* Turn market and sales input into clear perspectives and concrete recommendations that influence go-to-market decisions, positioning, pricing, and prioritization.
* Identify, create, and refine the sales enablement assets that most effectively support sales in real deals, based on where deals are won or lost.
* Ensure sales enablement is adopted and used, iterating based on feedback, deal outcomes, and win/loss patterns.
* Own and drive go-to-market execution for product launches, ensuring messaging, narratives, and timing are clear, aligned, and commercially effective.
* Partner closely with Product, Sales, and Marketing to align insights with execution and ensure decisions are grounded in market reality.
* Support leadership with concise, decision-oriented insights that help guide strategic and commercial choices.


**We Believe You Have**
* Experience from B2B SaaS in product marketing, commercial strategy, pre-sales, growth, or similar roles.
* Demonstrated experience creating go-to-market or sales enablement material that contributes to better commercial outcomes.
* Strong ability to structure complex information, synthesize insights quickly, and turn them into clear, actionable output.
* A clear commercial mindset, with understanding of how positioning, messaging, and enablement drive demand and revenue.
* Comfort working cross-functionally with Product, Sales, and Marketing, including senior stakeholders.
* Confidence communicating recommendations and perspectives, both in writing and in discussion.
* A strong sense of ownership, thriving in change and ambiguity within a fast-moving scale-up environment.


**Bonus Points For**
* Background in management consulting, especially when combined with a more hands-on commercial role close to sales or product.
* Strong interest in AI and experience using modern tools to improve analysis, insight generation, or content creation.


**Not ticking every box?** 
 No worries! We value potential and drive, so apply anyway or connect with us- you might be just what we're looking for in our growing organisation! Join Aceve and take your expertise to the next level, together we are redefining what’s possible in craft and construction solutions!
   

  

*Aceve is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Our selection process is conducted continuously and without discrimination, ensuring an equal opportunity for all candidates.*
 Aceve is in business to back the builders of society. With over 900 employees, 100 million € in revenue and extensive experience in the field, we combine tradition and tech to provide a pioneering platform that helps our customers to achieve more.

title: Sr. Business Development Representative
description:
Genesys empowers organizations of all sizes to improve loyalty and business outcomes by creating the best experiences for their customers and employees. Through Genesys Cloud, the AI-powered Experience Orchestration platform, organizations can accelerate growth by delivering empathetic, personalized experiences at scale to drive customer loyalty, workforce engagement, efficiency and operational improvements.
   

  

 We employ more than 6,000 people across the globe who embrace empathy and cultivate collaboration to succeed. And, while we offer great benefits and perks like larger tech companies, our employees have the independence to make a larger impact on the company and take ownership of their work. Join the team and create the future of customer experience together.
   

  

 Are you naturally curious to explore new technologies and share their benefits with others? Are you keen to become an empathetic consultant, a real trusted advisor and Genesys ambassador? Are you always ready to jump on an ease and personalized conversation by using multithreading across email, voice, LinkedIn, video, etc. channels?
   

  

 We are seeking a commercially driven
 **Senior Business Development Representative (Snr BDR)** 
 to drive pipeline growth across the
 **Nordic region** 
 , with a primary focus on
 **Denmark and Sweden** 
 .
   

  

 This role is responsible for owning both
 **inbound and outbound pipeline generation** 
 , supporting enterprise and upper mid-market accounts, and partnering closely with cross-functional teams to accelerate revenue growth. The ideal candidate combines strong prospecting expertise with commercial awareness and a deep understanding of Nordic business culture.
   

  

 This is a high-impact role for someone who thrives in a collaborative, performance-driven environment and is motivated by building meaningful enterprise opportunities.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Own pipeline generation across Denmark and Sweden through a balanced mix of strategic outbound prospecting and inbound lead management
* Develop and execute targeted outbound account strategies aligned to territory plans and regional revenue priorities
* Qualify and convert marketing-generated leads into high-quality sales opportunities
* Research, map, and engage key decision-makers within enterprise and upper mid-market organizations
* Partner closely with Account Executives to support account planning, whitespace identification, and multi-threaded engagement strategies
* Collaborate with Marketing on regional campaigns, events, ABM initiatives, and follow-up execution
* Work cross-functionally with Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, Alliances, and Channel teams to identify expansion signals and new opportunities
* Clearly articulate the value of Genesys’ cloud and AI-driven CX solutions aligned to customer digital transformation initiatives
* Generate consistent, high-quality pipeline aligned to regional revenue targets
* Maintain disciplined CRM documentation, activity tracking, and accurate reporting in Salesforce
* Provide structured market feedback on trends, customer priorities, and competitive insights within the Nordic market
* Consistently meet and exceed KPIs related to meetings booked, pipeline generated, and opportunity conversion


**Minimum Qualifications:**
* 3–5 years of experience in a BDR, SDR, or Inside Sales role within SaaS, CX, cloud, or technology environments
* Proven success in outbound prospecting and pipeline generation within enterprise or upper mid-market accounts
* Experience managing both inbound and outbound lead flows
* Native-level fluency in Danish or Swedish (required)
* Professional fluency in English
* Strong understanding of Nordic business culture and consultative sales environments
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Strong organizational skills and CRM discipline
* Experience using Salesforce, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and modern sales engagement platforms
* Collaborative mindset with the ability to work effectively across multiple GTM functions


**Why Join Genesys?**
* Join a global leader in AI-driven customer experience technology
* Play a key role in expanding a strategically important Nordic market
* Competitive compensation with performance-based incentives
* Clear career progression pathways within a global sales organization
* Collaborative and high-performing team environment


 If a Genesys employee referred you, please use the link they sent you to apply.
   

  

**About Genesys:**
 Genesys® empowers more than 8,000 organizations worldwide to create the best customer and employee experiences. With agentic AI at its core, Genesys Cloud™ is the AI-Powered Experience Orchestration platform that connects people, systems, data and AI across the enterprise. As a result, organizations can drive customer loyalty, growth and retention while increasing operational efficiency and teamwork across human and AI workforces. To learn more, visit www.genesys.com.
   

  

**Reasonable Accommodations:**
 If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are limited in your ability to access or use this online application and need an alternative method for applying, you or someone you know may contact us at reasonable.accommodations@genesys.com.
   

  

 You can expect a response within 24–48 hours. To help us provide the best support, click the email link above to open a pre-filled message and complete the requested information before sending. If you have any questions, please include them in your email.
   

  

 This email is intended to support job seekers requesting accommodations. Messages unrelated to accommodation—such as application follow-ups or resume submissions—may not receive a response.
   

  

**Genesys is an equal opportunity employer committed to fairness in the workplace. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital status, domestic partner status, national origin, genetics, disability, military and veteran status, and other protected characteristics.**
*Please note that recruiters will never ask for sensitive personal or financial information during the application phase.*

title: Senior Backend Engineers - Fintech Group
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

 We are looking for experienced Senior Software Engineers who can develop production-level microservices to join our Fintech group here at Wolt.
   

  

 Our Engineering organization at Wolt consists of 700+ Engineers working across 70+ product teams. Some of us work on the visible parts, making our services easy on the eye and some of us focus on the unseen magic happening behind the scenes. ✨
   

  

 Our Engineers handle the whole development process (business logic, testing, database & data streaming, CI/CD, analytics, cloud) in an autonomous manner. They build things that are accessible and made to scale. They keep our systems in the best shape by simplifying the unnecessary complexity.
   

  

 We make the decisions as a team and group of teams for our ways of working and we take architectural decisions together. Everyone plays a role in our future.
   

  

 Our Engineers choose the best technologies that work for Wolt, their teams and themselves. Making good choices means finding scalable, robust technology that works in everyone’s best interests. The freedom to experiment and adopt the best technology benefits everyone.
   

  

 The main stack for these roles consists for example Golang (Echo), Kotlin (Ktor, Koin, Spring, grpc…), PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Kafka, Redis, GitHub Actions, AWS, Docker and Kubernetes.
   

  

 Needless to say, in such an environment there’s a lot of room for learning, teaching and growing together!
   

  

 Go ahead and check our Kotlin- & Golang-related Tech Talks below.
   

  

* The very fresh Scaling Kotlin Backend Development Podcast
* Kotlin at Wolt
* Kotlin Meetup
* Golang Tech Talks


**FinTech Group**
 FinTech Group is dedicated to shaping the future of financial services at Wolt. 🚀 Our Fintech teams play a critical role in enabling smooth and automated money flows for our customers, merchants, and courier partners as well as delivering financial products to them. To meet local requirements and provide the best financial solutions, our Fintech engineering teams are at the forefront of building integrations and automating financial processes for local country teams, supporting expansion in our existing markets and into new ones. Our focus has been also on building Consumer Fintech, introducing brand-new products and bringing innovations that elevate the financial experience for all our users.
   

  

 We currently have multiple roles in our Fintech Teams, and depending on your experience, we will make sure to find the right team for you during the interview process. If you are always open to learning new things, find motivation in working with skilled and nice colleagues, and don't shy away from highly challenging engineering topics, you'll fit right in! 💡👩‍💻
   

  

 📍This role can be based in one of our tech hubs in Helsinki, Stockholm, or our newest additions, Timisoara & Bucharest in Romania. Read more about our hybrid and remote setup here. If you live outside of these countries, don't worry! We provide relocation support to help you make your way to Finland or Sweden.
   

  

**Our humble expectations**
 We'd love to see experience with either Golang or Kotlin. We appreciate previous experience in handling the whole development cycle all the way to production. However, what truly sets you apart is your ability to tackle big challenges together, envision scalability and availability, and dare to question conventional decisions. You’ll be successful in our teams if you quickly grasp new concepts and thrive in an environment of continuous learning.🌟
   

  

 We put a lot of focus on the ability to collaborate well with others. We work closely with our teammates and having a good connection with team members is essential. We understand that everyone has their own unique way of communicating with others. We expect you to be yourself, express your opinions, and work together with the rest of the team.
   

  

 In addition to technical expertise, we cherish those who take ownership beyond the obvious, have an insatiable hunger for knowledge, make collaborative decisions, and enthusiastically collaborate with diverse teams Woltwide. We value the unique perspectives and skills you bring to our adventure, and we're excited to see what you can achieve with us! 👥 🚀
   

  

 Fluency in English language is mandatory.
   

  

**Next steps**
 During the initial screening call our Talent Acquisition Partner will discuss with you your expectations and possible domain preferences as well as share more about different teams. After the recruiter screening call, the interviewing steps are conducted and a specific team being proposed at the end of the process - that’s the moment when you’ll latest get to meet your possible Team Lead. Throughout the process, we will do our best to match your experience, skills and aspirations with the most suitable team at Wolt!
   

  

 For any further questions about the position, you can turn to Product+ Talent Acquisition Partner - Severi Kausola - severi.kausola@wolt.com
   

  

 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: IT‑supporttekniker till servicedesk
description:
Vill du arbeta i en roll där service, problemlösning och användarkontakt står i fokus? Då kan detta vara rollen för dig – vi söker nu en IT‑supporttekniker till servicedesk (1st line) till vår spännande kund.
   

  

 Du blir en del av ett härligt team om cirka tio personer där samarbete, kunskapsdelning och ett gott bemötande står i centrum. I rollen är du första kontaktpunkt för företagets interna användare och spelar en viktig roll i att säkerställa att användarna får snabb, tydlig och professionell IT‑support i sin vardag.
   

  

**OM ROLLEN // MAKE IMPACT WHERE IT MATTERS**
 Som 1st line‑tekniker hanterar du inkommande ärenden via telefon, chatt, mejl och ärendehanteringssystem. Du arbetar med att lösa vanligt förekommande IT‑relaterade frågor och problem, guida användare rätt samt vid behov eskalera ärenden vidare enligt etablerade rutiner.
   

  

 Arbetet omfattar både teknisk och administrativ support i en Microsoft‑baserad miljö.
   

  

**I Rollen Kommer Du Bland Annat Att**
* Ta emot och hantera inkommande supportärenden via telefon, chatt, mejl och ärendehanteringssystem
* Ge användarnära support i Office 365 och kundens interna system
* Felsöka och lösa vanligt förekommande problem kopplade till datorer, applikationer och användarkonton
* Hantera onboarding och offboarding såsom konton, behörigheter och IT‑utrustning enligt befintliga rutiner
* Ge onsite‑support vid behov, exempelvis för datorer, skärmar, mobiler och enklare konferensteknik
* Arbeta med grundläggande administration i Office 365, Active Directory / Azure AD och Intune
* Dokumentera ärenden och åtgärder i ServiceNow samt säkerställa god återkoppling till användare
* Eskalera ärenden vidare till 2nd line vid mer komplexa tekniska problem


**DIN PROFIL // YOU BRING THE EDGE**
 Vi söker dig som har
 **6 månader–2 års erfarenhet av IT‑support** 
 , gärna i en servicedesk eller helpdesk. Du har ett genuint intresse för service och trivs i en roll med mycket användarkontakt.
   

  

**Som Person Är Du**
* Serviceinriktad och kommunikativ
* Lösningsorienterad och strukturerad
* Positiv och trygg i att guida användare med varierande IT‑vana
* En lagspelare som bidrar till ett gott samarbete i teamet


**Vi Ser Gärna Att Du Har Erfarenhet Av**
* Användarsupport i Windows‑ och Microsoft‑miljöer
* Office 365 (Outlook, Teams, OneDrive m.fl.)
* Grundläggande felsökning av hård‑ och mjukvara
* Ärendehanteringssystem
* Active Directory / Azure AD på användarnivå
* Onsite‑support och hantering av IT‑utrustning


**OM WISE IT**
 Wise IT är specialister på rekrytering, konsultlösningar och strategisk kompetensmatchning inom IT och tech. Teknik förändras snabbt , men med rätt person på rätt plats får du kontroll på framtiden. Vi matchar människor med skarp teknisk kompetens och förmågan att förstå helheten. Resultatet? IT som fungerar i praktiken, inte bara i teorin. Vi ser till att du inte bara följer utvecklingen utan driver den.
   

  

**NÄR DU BLIR EN AV OSS**
 Som konsult hos Wise blir du en del av ett sammanhang där vi värdesätter både din trygghet och din utveckling. Vi erbjuder marknadsmässig lön, friskvårdsbidrag, pensionsavsättning och kollektivavtal – för oss är inget viktigare än att du känner dig trygg i din anställning.
